 The intern will also have the opportunity to develop their analytical and research skills. The objective of the internship is to provide a learning opportunity for an interested and motivated student within a relevant study area. The intern will be part of a specific team, under Global Programmes, learning from all team members in their different capacities.
   

  

 Management and Organization
   

  

 Each intern will be supervised by a mentor from one of the above-mentioned teams. The interns will be working at International IDEA’s headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  

 Timing and Work plan
   

  

 The internship position will be full-time from August/September 2026 until January/February 2027 or as agreed with the mentor and the university. The intern will work office hours, 09:00-17:00, or as agreed with respective mentors. The intern can work from the office and/or at home, or as agreed with the mentor.
   

  

**Qualifications And Required Skills**
* Recently graduated (within the last 1-2 years) or currently studying a course focusing on political science, sustainable development, international law, peace studies, environmental studies or a related subject. Postgraduate students (MA/MSc/PhD) are encouraged to apply.
* Fluency in written and spoken English is required. Proficiency in additional languages in International IDEA priority regions, such as Spanish, French, or Arabic, is an asset.
* Strong analytical, drafting, editorial and problem-solving skills are required.
* Ability to appreciate diversity and work as part of a team in such an environment.
* Ability to assess, manage and structure information.
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office suite.
* Knowledge of information management systems is an asset.
* Previous work or research experience within the field of democracy, elections, gender, political finance, is an asset.


 Selection Process
   

  

* Candidates selected to proceed to the next stage of the process will be contacted once all applications have been carefully reviewed.
* Evaluation of shortlisted candidates will include an online interview and if needed, a short-written test/assessment.
* All candidates will be notified of the status of their application via email once the process has been finalized.


 Terms of internship
   

  

 All internships at International IDEA are unpaid, and insurance cover in respect of travel, health, medical costs, disability, accident, and death is not provided by International IDEA. It is your responsibility to make your own insurance arrangements to ensure such cover.
 **Please note that we are not able to provide support with relocation, including visa applications or financial assistance.**
 Learn more about International IDEA.
   

  

 The International Institute for Democracy and Electoral Assistance (International IDEA) is an intergovernmental organization that supports sustainable democracy worldwide.

title: Business Application Expert in the Finance and Control area
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Are you a responsible and driven person who likes problem-solving and wants to develop at work? Do you want to work for a company that both challenges and cares? Welcome to
 **Vivicta** 
**!**
 We are looking for a
 **Business Application Expert** 
 who wants to be part of our company. Vivicta is a true multi-cloud platform provider with a full range of infrastructure choices at scale. We are fueling rapid software development and data innovation with strong security, scalability, speed, and savings for businesses.
   

  

 We are building a new business IT function and a
 **new team that will be responsible for the Vivicta internal IT needs** 
 . The function will be responsible for providing the business IT services to Vivicta business and the whole service lifecycle. The scope covers both core IT capabilities like collaboration solutions, workstations, office network etc. as well as business applications, integrations, and data management.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to join a team that will create and provide world class business IT solutions and services for a major IT service provider.
   

  

**When joining Vivicta as a Business Application Expert, you will:**
* Secure that functionality of the applications in the domain meet the business need
* Ensure that system and service requirements are documented
* Ensure that systems are integrated according to need and that integrations are documented
* Understand the business processes relevant to the domain and how processes work through the systems and take that into design
* Ensure that data design for the systems is done
* Support key users in functional topics
* Design and plan changes to applications in the domain
* Perform configuration tasks (in case applicable)


**As a Business Application Expert, you will bring expertise to:**
* Configure and customize Oracle Financials modules (GL, AP, AR, FA, CM) to meet business needs.
* Design and document system integrations between systems un scope
* Design data migration and conversion activities (FBDI, ADFdi, SQL/PLSQL) ensuring accuracy and compliance.
* Design, develop and maintain reports and dashboards in reporting and EPM solution (now OTBI, BI Publisher, Hyperion, and Workday Adaptive Planning)
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across applications, ensuring performance, security, and audit compliance


**Who Are We Looking For**
* You have previous experience in Oracle EBS and EPM solutions (e.g. HFM Hyperion and Workday Adaptive) and financial management processes
* You have previous experience in designing system integrations using APIs
* Fluent in the English language both verbal and writing
* Collaborator supporting success of the Vivicta business
* Promoting and providing deep expertise in the domain
* Fact based decision making and taking accountability
* Strives success of the services and supported business processes
* Excellent presentation and communication skills
* Experience from the IT industry in similar role is preferrable
* Suitable academic degree


 As a person, you are communicative, responsive and a genuine leader with a good ability to collaborate with customers, colleagues and operational functions. In addition to that, we see that you have a great interest in learning new things and have a well-structured way of working as you are responsible for all parts of the applications with many actors involved.
   

  

**We offer**
 We offer you professional growth, meaningful projects, open culture and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working. Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle where you need to unlearn and relearn every day as new possibilities emerge.
   

  

 At Vivicta, we are dedicated to supporting your success on your individual career path, offering opportunities for professional growth. We foster a collaborative culture and partner with leading market vendors on engaging projects across industries.
   

  

 Our flexible hybrid working model reflects our culture of trust which rooted into our daily operations. We prioritize a healthy work-life balance for our colleagues and embrace openness, curiosity, and continuous learning.
   

  

 We encourage a mindset of adaptability, ensuring our people stay ahead of emerging trends to deliver innovative solutions and inspire our customers in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.
   

  

*We conduct background checks for all final candidates, and some roles may require security clearance during hiring or later—always handled within local legislation and with care and confidentiality.*
*Vivicta is committed to diversity and welcomes applicants of all genders, ages, abilities, ethnicities, orientations, beliefs, and backgrounds.*
*Vivicta declines calls from recruitment companies.*

title: Commerce Lead
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients’ challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.
   

  

 We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.
   

  

 At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy.*
**Overview**
 As a Commerce Lead, you are the expert at Publicis Media in driving commerce-led growth across e-commerce, retail media and marketplaces. You will be part of the Performance organisation, reporting to the Head of Performance, and act as the senior specialist for commerce-related strategy, activation and optimisation.
   

  

 You serve as a key point of expertise for clients’ e-commerce, sales and commercial teams, as well as internally towards Publicis Groupe. As a Commerce Lead, you are responsible for ensuring that our commerce initiatives are data-driven, commercially impactful and closely connected to clients’ business KPIs, with a strong focus on product data, feeds, retail media and marketplace performance.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Examples of responsibilities as a Commerce Lead:
   

  

* Responsibility for developing and driving Publicis’ commerce offering, including e-commerce, retail media and marketplaces.
* Responsibility for ensuring that commerce strategies are aligned with clients’ business objectives, commercial priorities and performance KPIs.
* Responsibility for analysing and optimising on-site and off-site commerce performance, including product visibility, conversion, promotions, feed quality and retail SEO.
* Responsibility for product and SKU-level optimisation, ensuring that assortment, availability and performance data are used to drive growth.
* Responsibility for developing and maintaining partnerships with retail media platforms, marketplaces and commerce-related technology providers.
* Acting as a specialist advisor to clients and internal teams in commerce-related projects, pitches, more business and new business opportunities.
* Responsibility for spreading knowledge and best practices within commerce and retail media internally and externally.


**Qualifications**
 To excel in this role, you must be capable of leading yourself and influencing others while being commercially minded, curious and analytical. Additionally, we are seeking someone who:
   

  

* Has extensive experience within e-commerce, retail media or commerce-driven performance marketing.
* Has strong knowledge of product data, feeds, marketplaces and how these impact visibility and sales.
* Is solution-oriented and service-minded, both internally and towards clients, with a strong commercial mindset.
* Has a robust drive for acquiring knowledge and building networks internally, with clients and within the commerce and retail media ecosystem.
* Maintains organisation and structure, delivering across multiple stakeholders while balancing short-term performance with long-term commercial growth.
* Is motivated by driving revenue impact, business growth and customer satisfaction.


**Additional Information**
 In addition to a welcoming culture and inclusive environment with passionate colleagues we offer you:
   

  

**Career Opportunities**
 Local and Global opportunities through the Power Of One.
   

  

**Personal and Professional Learning**
 Global AI learning platform where you can participate in +30 000 classes and connect with colleagues from all over the world.
   

  

**Flexible Ways of Working**
 We want to be an employer where work life balance is cherished. We love to spend time with our colleagues at the office but also believe in the output of your work not where the work is being done.
   

  

**Work Your World**
 For six weeks a year, the world is yours. Every employee can work anywhere on the planet where there's a Publicis office. A new city, a favorite locale, or even a different country - Go. Grow. Explore.
   

  

**Mental Health**
 The happiness and health of our people is paramount to us. We work continuously on maintaining a healthy and safe working environment through initiatives that facilitate the well-being of our employees.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Generous benefit package.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Strateg – utveckling, ledningsstöd och hr-frågor
description:
Stockholms stad, Förskoleförvaltningen, Avdelningen för ledningsstöd och IT
 



 Stockholm – vår huvudstad med miljoner drömmar, förväntningar och ambitioner. Vi jobbar för alla som lever här idag och i framtiden. Nu söker vi dig som vill tänka stort, nytt och annorlunda med oss – för stockholmarna.
 



  





 Förskoleförvaltningen är en ung förvaltning med stor samlad kunskap och kompetens som bygger framtiden. I Stockholms förskolor går tiotusentals barn. Deras vardag och deras framtid är vårt uppdrag. Vi arbetar för en så bra förskola som möjligt och därför håller vi kontakt med alla som driver förskolor i Stockholms elva stadsdelsområden – oavsett om de är kommunalt drivna eller drivs i fristående regi.
 



  





 Hos oss jobbar i dagsläget nära 80 medarbetare inom många olika expertområden såsom
 



 tillsyn och tillståndsprövning, juridik, ekonomi samt utveckling inom förskolans alla sakområden. Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats med stort engagemang och goda möjligheter att påverka ditt arbete. Vårt kontor ligger på Kaplansbacken på Kungsholmen.
 



  





**Som strateg bidrar du till att utveckla avdelningens arbete inom kompetensförsörjning, HR och verksamhetsutveckling genom att driva utvecklingsuppdrag, genomföra utredningar och stärka arbetet med planering och uppföljning** 




  





**Välkommen till oss** 




 Avdelningen för ledningsstöd och it ansvarar för funktionerna hr, kommunikation, nämndkansli, it, registratur, informationssäkerhet och beredskapsfrågor samt administration. Funktionerna nämndkansli, registratur och administration bildar en enhet inom avdelningen.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder** 




 Vi är en ung förvaltning med många spännande kommunikationsuppdrag. Utöver detta erbjuds även ett stort nätverk inom Stockholms stad.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder även** 



* friskvårdsbidrag
* distansarbete är en möjlighet, kontoret är huvudarbetsplatsen och vi arbetar majoriteten av vår tid på kontoret
* flexibel arbetstid
* möjlighet till semesterväxling som kan innebära fem eller sex extra semesterdagar.



  





**Din roll** 




 Rollen som strateg med inriktning mot kompetensförsörjning och hr arbetar du förvaltningsövergripande med att utveckla och stärka avdelningens strategiska arbete. Du samverkar med flera funktioner inom förvaltningen och bidrar till att driva utveckling inom såväl hr- och arbetsgivarfrågor som andra prioriterade verksamhetsområden.
 



  





 Rollen innebär ett ansvar för att samordna och driva olika utvecklingsuppdrag, både inom hr och inom andra identifierade utvecklingsområden i förvaltningen. Du arbetar även med verksamhetsutveckling och bidrar till att stärka struktur, kvalitet och uppföljning i förvaltningens arbete.
 



  





 Du stödjer avdelningschefen i planering och uppföljning av avdelningens interna processer, bland annat kopplat till verksamhetsplaneringens årshjul. I uppdraget ingår också ansvar för kvalitetsuppföljning och rapportering. Du utgör stöd till avdelningens ledningsgrupp.
 



  





**I rollen ingår bland annat att** 



* samordna och ansvara för avdelningens arbete med exempelvis verksamhetsplan, verksamhetsberättelse, delegationsordning, riskanalys och internkontrollplan
* leda utredningar och driva utvecklingsfrågor utifrån budgetuppdrag eller identifierade utvecklingsbehov, både avdelningsövergripande och inom hr- och arbetsgivarområdet
* följa utvecklingen inom relevant lagstiftning, kommunal verksamhet samt frågor som rör stadens utveckling och förskoleområdet
* samverka med andra förvaltningar och externa aktörer, exempelvis andra kommuner och myndigheter
* svara på remisser samt ta fram underlag i form av PM, rapporter och tjänsteutlåtanden.



  





 Du bidrar också i övrigt till avdelningens uppdrag och till att ge stöd till förvaltningens verksamheter
 



  





**Din kompetens och erfarenhet** 




 Vi söker dig som har
 


* högskoleexamen inom personalvetenskap alternativt annan högskoleexamen som vi bedömer relevant för tjänsten
* aktuell erfarenhet av brett strategiskt och utvecklingsinriktat hr-arbete
* erfarenhet av projektledning och/eller har en projektledarutbildning
* erfarenhet av att samordna arbete och/eller processer
* erfarenhet av att skriva tjänsteutlåtanden eller motsvarande
* goda kunskaper i MS Office
* erfarenhet av arbete i politiskt styrd organisation
* mycket god förmåga och intresse av att uttrycka dig väl på svenska i både tal och skrift.



  





**Det är meriterande om du även har** 



* erfarenhet av ILS/Stratsys, eller motsvarande verksamhetssystem
* erfarenhet av arbete med organisationsutveckling och chefs och ledarutveckling.



  





**Din personlighet och ditt arbetssätt** 




 Vid rekryteringen lägger vi stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och kompetenser.
 



 I rollen som strateg är det viktigt att du är självgående, strategisk, strukturerad och tar ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och processer. Du har ett brett perspektiv på frågor där du ser den långsiktiga betydelsen och vidare konsekvenser av beslut och handlingar. Utifrån ändrade omständigheter eller prioriteringar styr du om arbetsuppgifter och ställer om ditt förhållningssätt.
 



  





 Att vara lyhörd och samarbetsinriktad kommer naturligt för dig och du har lätt för att anpassa din kommunikation utifrån mottagare och situation. Rollen kräver att du är en god skribent med förmåga att självständigt ta fram välstrukturerade underlag av hög kvalitet. Du har även mycket god förmåga att ta till dig, analysera och strukturera omfattande skriftlig information.
 



  





**Övrigt** 




 Vi rekryterar utan det personliga brevet i denna rekrytering, för att stärka fokus på de kompetenser och erfarenheter som efterfrågas för denna roll. Vid bedömningen av din ansökan kommer vi endast att utgå ifrån ditt CV och ett antal frågor du får besvara i samband med att du söker tjänsten. Vi önskar att du svarar konkret och kortfattat på frågorna, och att det finns en tydlig koppling mellan dina svar och ditt cv.
 



  





 Arbetspsykologiska tester kan komma att användas som del i rekryteringsprocessen.
 



  





 Vi ser mångfald som berikande och välkomnar alla sökande.
 



  





**Länkar** 




 Läs mer om:
 



 Våra förmåner
 
 här
 




 Förskoleförvaltningen
 
 här
 




  





 Stockholms stad arbetar med kompetensbaserad rekrytering som syftar till att se till varje persons kompetens och därmed motverka diskriminering.

title: eCom Experience - Project Lead
description:
Marshall Group is the audio, tech, and design powerhouse uniting musicians and music lovers through genre-breaking innovation. Our flagship brand, Marshall, is uniquely positioned with over 60 years of rock ‘n’ roll attitude on stage, at home, and on the go. Our iconic products are brought to life by a dedicated team of 800 passionate employees and sold in over 90 markets worldwide.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As an eCom Experience Project Lead in the eCom Experience team, you will be working in the intersection of Marketing, Technology and Business. You will oversee all Experience projects and initiatives across the site & CRM on a global, regional, and local level with the goal of creating the best experience of the brand and generating business value. You report to the Director of eCom Experience.
   

  

**Role & Responsibilities:**
* Translating experience, brand, and Commercial strategies into clear briefs, execution plans, timelines and overseeing end-to-end execution. Prioritise ad-hoc initiatives that might arise and make sure it fits into the overall roadmap.
* Acting as a key liaison between strategic planning, Brand teams, Regional teams, Product launch team, Commercial teams, and the internal design agency to execute across the website and CRM.
* Lead and maintain the eCom Experience roadmap, project board and calendar, ensuring alignment with brand priorities, product launches and promotional plans while maximising team capacity.
* Ensure that the site & CRM experience are fully compliant with brand standards, best-in-class and cohesive across all touchpoints and delivered on schedule.
* Collaborate cross-functionally to align needs, predict dependencies, and proactively find and resolve bottlenecks that could affect execution or timelines.
* Review performance to find opportunities for optimisation, improvements to workflows, processes, and planning to enhance operational efficiency.


**You probably have the following experiences & skills:**
* 8+ years of experience in project management or related roles within e-commerce, advertising, digital marketing, content production, or similar fields.
* Proven track record of leading high-performing teams, driving results across complex, cross-functional initiatives.
* Strong understanding of the consumer journey from a 360-degree perspective, combining technical and creative insight. You naturally work toward a seamless brand experience and user journey across touchpoints, even when priorities shift rapidly.
* Familiarity with e-commerce and digital platforms, including CMS, CRM, and other technology tools, enabling you to plan, communicate, and execute creative and strategic initiatives effectively.
* Proven project management experience leading cross-functional digital initiatives
* Exceptional communication, organisational, and stakeholder management skills
* Good to have: Experience working in advertising agencies that deal with e-commerce clients


**Our pledge:**
 We thrive to foster an inclusive workplace, and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, disability, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age or marital status. We firmly believe that Marshall thrives when our employees do, leading to better experiences for our consumers.
   

  

 We encourage applications from all over the world. To enable transitioning from another country for a role at Marshall, we offer relocation support. This support is tailored for each role but always includes visa/work permit application, local authority registration, and home finding service. Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.
   

  

**Does this sound like you?**
 We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Salesforce Architect
description:
**Role overview** 




 We are now looking for a Technical Architect within Salesforce who will be a key person driving technical decisions, setting architectural standards, and helping the customers transform complex requirements into scalable, high‑quality, and sustainable Salesforce solutions.
 



  





**This is what the role will look like** 




 As a Technical Architect Salesforce, the role is varied and comes with significant technical responsibility. Among other things, the person will:
 


* Build bridges between teams and technology: Act as a link between our Salesforce team, customers’ IT environments, and other stakeholders.
* Design and analyze: Define architecture, advanced integrations, and technical solutions aligned with both business needs and long‑term IT strategy.
* Take technical leadership:
* Lead development teams, ensure technical quality, set best practices, and provide clear technical direction.
* Hands‑on when needed:
* In some projects, actively contribute to development (e.g. Apex, Lightning Web Components, integrations) to ensure the right technical direction.
* Work proactively with risks and quality:
* Identify technical risks, ensure documentation, security, and compliance with regulations such as GDPR.
* Participate in presales:
* Handle technically complex questions, contribute to solution design, support upsell opportunities, and customers’ digital strategies.



  





**We are looking for someone who** 




 Has a combination of deep Salesforce technical expertise, architectural experience, independence, and strong communication skills.
 



  





**Technical expertise** 



* Senior technical systems architect with broad IT background and deep understanding of Salesforce Core, Lightning Platform, integrations, and data models.
* 5+ years of experience in the software development lifecycle and at least 3 years in architectural roles, including experience as lead architect on Salesforce projects.
* Strong experience in designing and implementing advanced integrations and system architectures beyond standard Salesforce functionality.
* Hands‑on development experience (Apex, LWC, integrations, etc.).
* Solid understanding of design patterns, large data volumes, data security, data migration/ETL.
* Experience identifying and mitigating technical risks and leading teams technically.



  





 If you are interested don´t hesitate to apply or send me your profile to ibermudez@k2partnering.com

title: Programmatic Specialist
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients’ challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.
   

  

 We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.
   

  

 At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy.*
**Overview**
 We are currently seeking a Programmatic Specialist for our programmatic team in Stockholm. The team is an experienced and cheerful group constantly exploring new collaborations and tests related to media and data across DSP platforms such as Google, Amazon and Adform.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Your tasks and main responsibilities range from strategy and setup to management and optimization, as well as subsequent reporting and recommendations for programmatic campaigns.
   

  

 As a Programmatic Specialist you will work in the following areas:
   

  

* Develop programmatic media and data strategy for our clients and effectively communicate these recommendations in a precise and understandable manner.
* Design, plan, and purchase programmatic campaigns.
* Hands-on campaign management through DSPs, including bid strategy, data segmentation, optimization, and campaign management.
* Continuously analyze, optimize, and evaluate campaign results.


**Qualifications**
 In order to be successfull in this role we believe that you have:
   

  

* Relevant work experience in data management, e-commerce, or marketing.
* A fluent level of English and Swedish, both written and spoken.
* Previous experience with digital campaigns is preferred, including programmatic, search, social, or display.
* Demonstrated interest in technology and digital platforms, with proficiency in numbers and Excel.
* Ability to seamlessly transition between detailed tactical thinking and long-term strategic planning.


**Desired Qualities**
* Structured, independent, and adept at meeting deadlines.
* Strong collaborative and communication skills, capable of working across departments and engaging with clients and suppliers effectively.
* Solution-oriented with meticulous attention to detail and a high level of ambition and analytical ability.


**Additional Information**
 In addition to a welcoming culture and inclusive environment with passionate colleagues we offer you:
   

  

**Career Opportunities**
 Local and Global opportunities through the Power Of One.
   

  

**Personal and Professional Learning**
 Global AI learning platform where you can participate in +30 000 classes and connect with colleagues from all over the world.
   

  

**Flexible Ways of Working**
 We want to be an employer where work life balance is cherished. We love to spend time with our colleagues at the office but also believe in the output of your work not where the work is being done.
   

  

**Work Your World**
 For six weeks a year, the world is yours. Every employee can work anywhere on the planet where there's a Publicis office. A new city, a favorite locale, or even a different country - Go. Grow. Explore.
   

  

**Mental Health**
 The happiness and health of our people is paramount to us. We work continuously on maintaining a healthy and safe working environment through initiatives that facilitate the well-being of our employees.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Generous benefit package.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Music Experience)
description:
**About us** 
 Soundtrack is a B2B scale-up company providing music streaming services for businesses. We serve small customers like the café around the corner, and much bigger brands like Joe & the Juice, Toni & Guy and TAG Heuer. On the inside, we're a bunch of talented, motivated and humble engineers, designers and music experts. We believe in product-led growth, where the product is the primary driver of customer acquisition, conversion and expansion.
   

  

**The Role** 
 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Frontend Engineer** 
 to join the Music Experience team at Soundtrack. The Music Experience team is a key part of our product development and is responsible for how our users discover music and create playlists.
   

  

 As a Senior Frontend Engineer in the Music Experience team, you’ll work on a wide range of user-centric projects together with engineers, product owners, UI/UX designers, machine learning experts, researchers, music experts, and analysts.
   

  

 Your primary focus will be on building new features and continuously improving our applications built with
 **React and React Native (TypeScript)** 
 . We are a
 **data-driven team** 
 and iterate continuously based on insights, A/B testing, and qualitative user feedback.
   

  

 You can check out the How it works page to see what kind of features you will be working on or download our app and sign up for a free trial to get a first-hand experience.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Building, releasing, and continuously improving existing features together with UI/UX designers, researchers, and analysts
* Developing and maintaining consistent and reusable UI components and libraries used by multiple teams
* Contributing to the team’s vision, strategy, and agenda
* Helping the team grow as a whole by sharing knowledge and lifting each other up


**About You** 
 Just like us, you love music. You're driven and entrepreneurial, but you know how to be a team player too. Regardless of roles, we're always looking to work with people who can adapt to constant change, prioritise what's important, stay humble, open, curious and with a passion for details.
   

  

* Communicative and easy to work with
* Self-driven and proactive – you take initiative and deliver results
* Adaptable and comfortable in a changing environment
* Pragmatic and methodical in your approach
* Curious and eager to learn new technologies


**Requirements**
* At least 4 years of professional experience working with JavaScript and TypeScript in production environments
* Experience building and maintaining production-grade web and/or mobile applications
* Hands-on experience with React and React Native
* Ability to translate design concepts into high-quality, well-implemented user interfaces
* Comfortable with Git, Node, (p)npm and React Native/Browser development tools


**Beneficial Requirements**
* General interest in music and/or music technology
* iOS, Android, Mac, and/or Windows app development
* Modern, accessible and performant web development
* GraphQL APIs and libraries (we use Apollo client and GraphQL federation)
* Automated testing
* Knowledge of functional programming
* Experience setting up JS tooling like Vite / Expo / Nx or similar
* Backend development (the Music Experience backend is primarily built in Python)


**Employee Benefits**
* We offer a flexible workplace with the possibility to work remotely
* Generous pension plan
* Yearly budget for health, wellness and personal development
* Laptop and mobile phone of your choice with included cellular subscription
* Regular social activities such as team events, meet ups, after works and off-sites
* Daily breakfast served at the office


 At Soundtrack, we believe that diversity fuels creativity and innovation. We're committed to building a team that reflects a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. We welcome applications from individuals of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, abilities, religions, sexual orientations, and identities.
   

  

 We reserve the right to close this vacancy early if we identify a suitable candidate before the application deadline. To ensure consideration, we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position or need to reach out, get in touch with Petter Machado at petter@soundtrack.io. Please note that we only accept applications submitted via our career page and do not accept applications by e-mail.
   

  

 We will be back reviewing and answering applications in mid-January 2026. Until then, have a wonderful holiday and a Happy New Year! 🎉

title: Doctoral student in Collaboration for efficient and sustainable infrastructure development
description:
**Project description**




**Third-cycle subject:** 
 Real Estate and Construction Management/Business Studies
   

  





 KTH is now starting a research project in collaboration with the public authority Svenska kraftnät, which is facing major challenges in rapidly strengthening and expanding the Swedish national grid for electricity. To realise the goals, Svenska kraftnät will use collaboration-based procurement strategies, both for individual projects and for larger packages of projects. However, running large collaborative contracts with integrated processes is complex and new for many organizations and individuals. This research project is funded by Svenska kraftnät and aims to produce research-based knowledge to develop their operations but also to contribute to strengthening Swedish client competence in general.  
   

  





 We are now looking for a doctoral student who will study the implementation of the new procurement strategies. The project will mainly use a qualitative approach based on interviews, observations of meetings and document analysis. You will work closely with Svenska kraftnät and your supervisors. As a doctoral student, you will be part of a small but internationally leading research group with extensive experience of driving development in collaboration with the industry. You will also be part of a network of doctoral students and senior researchers at other universities in Sweden and internationally.
   

  





**Supervision:** 
 Anna Kadefors is proposed to supervise the doctoral student. Decisions are made on admission
   

  





**Admission requirements**




 To be admitted to postgraduate education (Chapter 7, 39 § Swedish Higher Education Ordinance), the applicant must have basic eligibility in accordance with either of the following:
 


* passed a second cycle degree (for example a master's degree), or
* completed course requirements of at least 240 higher education credits, of which at least 60 second-cycle higher education credits, or
* acquired, in some other way within or outside the country, substantially equivalent knowledge
* your degree can be from a technical university (e g Built environment, Industrial Engineering, Architecture), social sciences (e g Business administration, Public administration) or behavioural sciences with a focus on organizational development.
* for this position, high proficiency in Swedish (or Norwegian or Danish) is required as this is necessary for data collection and in the daily work.



 In addition to the above, there is also a mandatory requirement for English equivalent to English B/6.
   

  





**Selection**




 In order to succeed as a doctoral student at KTH you need to be goal oriented and persevering in your work. During the selection process, candidates will be assessed upon their ability to:
 


* independently pursue his or her work
* collaborate with others,
* have a professional approach and
* analyze and work with complex issues.
* we appreciate curiosity, creativity, receptivity, conscientiousness and interest in society.
* writing skills are also important.



 After the qualification requirements, great emphasis will be placed on personal skills. 
   

  





**Target degree: Doctoral degree**




**Information regarding admission and employment**




 Only those admitted to postgraduate education may be employed as a doctoral student. The total length of employment may not be longer than what corresponds to full-time doctoral education in four years' time. An employed doctoral student can, to a limited extent (maximum 20%), perform certain tasks within their role, e.g. training and administration. A new position as a doctoral student is for a maximum of one year, and then the employment may be renewed for a maximum of two years at a time. 
   

  





 As a doctoral student, you are entitled to a workplace with many employee benefits and monthly salary according to KTH’s Doctoral student salary agreement. Read more about Doctoral studies (PhD) | KTH | Sweden.
   

  





**Union representatives**




 Contact information for
 
 union representatives.
   

  





**Doctoral Students`network (Students’ union on KTH Royal Institute of Technology)**




 Contact information for
 
 doctoral section.
   

  





**To apply for the position**




 Apply for the position and admission through KTH's recruitment system. It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure that the application is complete in accordance with the instructions in the advertisement.
   

  





 Applications must be received at the last closing date at midnight, CET/CEST (Central European Time/Central European Summer Time).
   

  





 Applications must include the following elements:
 


* Copies of diplomas and grades from previous university studies and certificates of fulfilled language requirements (see above). Translations into English or Swedish if the original document is not issued in one of these languages.Copies of originals must be certified.
* CV listing your educational and professional experience and knowledge.
* Application letter with a brief description of why you want to pursue research studies, about what your academic interests are and how they relate to your previous studies and future goals. (Maximum 2 pages long).



**Other information**




 For information about processing of personal data in the recruitment process.
   

  





 It may be the case that a position at KTH is classified as a security-sensitive role in accordance with the Protective Security Act (2018:585). If this applies to the specific position, a security clearance will be conducted for the applicant in accordance with the same law with the applicant's consent. In such cases, a prerequisite for employment is that the applicant is approved following the security clearance.
   

  





 We firmly decline all contact with staffing and recruitment agencies and job ad salespersons.
   

  





 Disclaimer:
 *In case of discrepancy between the Swedish original and the English translation of the job announcement, the Swedish version takes precedence.*




  
   

  





  
   

  





**Join us at KTH**
 KTH shapes the future through education, research and innovation. As a leading international technical university, we play an active role in advancing the transition towards a sustainable society. At KTH, you have the opportunity to grow and develop in a creative and dynamic environment, with good working conditions and attractive benefits. Equality, diversity and equal opportunities are essential to quality and form an integral part of KTH’s core values as a university and public authority.
   

  





 Learn more about our benefits and what it's like to work and grow at KTH

title: Product Manager - Drivers Experience
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*
**The Role**
 As a Product Manager on the Drivers Experience team, you will own
 **core account and vehicle experiences** 
 used by
 **over** 
**60 million active users annually** 
 . The
 **vehicles functionality is a prerequisite for the app’s core experiences** 
 , including parking, tolling, and other mobility features, and is relied on by millions of drivers every day. You’ll define and shape how users manage their accounts, vehicles, and preferences across the app, while driving key growth surfaces like vehicle onboarding, tolling, and parking permits.
   

  

 This role is central to the app’s
 **foundation, scale, and international expansion** 
 , giving you the opportunity to make a real impact on usability, growth, and stability across markets. If you enjoy
 **solving complex product problems, balancing user needs with regulatory and technical constraints, and building experiences that millions rely on** 
 , this role is for you.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Lead product discovery, understanding user needs and problems, and defining solutions that are valuable, usable, feasible, and viable.
* Own the full product lifecycle: from ideation, prioritization, and delivery, to tracking success and determining when to sunset features.
* Lead the adoption of AI to supercharge decision making, speed up discovery, and streamline daily workflows, ensuring the team leverages the latest technology to drive impact.
* Set, analyze and be accountable for metrics and KPIs to measure the impact of features and core product experience.
* Influence cross-functional teams and stakeholders without formal authority, ensuring alignment across engineering, design, analytics, and business partners.
* Balance growth, stability, and scalability, making trade offs informed by user insights, data, and business context.
* Advocate for the user perspective in all discussions and ensure experiences are intuitive, reliable, and delight drivers.


**About You - Your Background**
* 5+ years of Product Management experience, ideally with tech or SaaS products.
* Proven track record of defining and launching successful products.
* Strong skills in product discovery and delivery, with comfort navigating ambiguity and trade-offs.
* Ability to solve complex problems with sound judgment and structured, data-informed narratives.
* Experience working cross-functionally and influencing teams without formal authority.
* Curiosity and passion for learning, experimentation, and iteration.
* Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, to articulate ideas clearly across all levels.
* Bias towards action: you get things done, remove roadblocks, and stay focused on goals.
* Deep customer focus, understanding user needs and translating them into impactful experiences


**Why you’ll love this role**
* Work on foundational experiences used by millions of drivers.
* Drive high-impact features that touch identity, vehicles, and core flows
* Tackle complex, cross-market challenges in growth, regulation, and scalability
* Join a tight-knit, collaborative 7-person team that values ownership and creativity


 We will consider candidates in both Amsterdam and Stockholm for this role.
   

  

 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Verksamhetsspecialist till registraturen
description:
*Är du en expert på hanteringen av allmänna handlingar som vill dela din kunskap med andra medarbetare? Vill du bidra till att hitta digitala lösningar som fungerar i verksamheten? Som verksamhetsspecialist blir du en nyckelperson som stöttar och utbildar användare, samverkar med IT och driver krav på systemlösningar inom regionens informationshantering.*
**Om oss**
 Hos oss på trafikförvaltningen får du jobba med starka varumärken som SL, Waxholmsbolaget, Färdtjänst i Region Stockholm och Spårvägsmuseet.
   

  

 Tillsammans ansvarar vi för halva Sveriges kollektivtrafik och vi har höga ambitioner. Vi utvecklar en av världens mest hållbara och attraktiva kollektivtrafik. Och vi jobbar dagligen med att minska vår miljöpåverkan, öka social hållbarhet och ansvarfullt förvalta våra gemensamma medel. Utan oss stannar Stockholm.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som verksamhetsspecialist på registraturen är du en nyckelperson i utvecklingen av regionens digitala informationshantering. Du håller i utbildningar för medarbetare kring hanteringen av allmänna handlingar, och stöttar handläggare i t.ex. diarieföring, arkivering och registrering. Du arbetar självständigt med att driva utvecklingsfrågor, samverkar med IT och andra specialistfunktioner och säkerställer att tekniken stödjer verksamhetens behov. Rollen innebär varierande arbetsuppgifter, från att hålla utbildningar inom handlingsoffentlighet och arbetssätt till att svara på handläggares frågor, testa funktionalitet och hantera supportärenden och bidra till utformningen av den digitala arbetsplatsen.
   

  

**Några exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**
* Hålla utbildningar för medarbetare kring hanteringen av allmänna handlingar och informationshantering, arbetssätt och systemanvändning.
* Ansvara för användarrelationer kring systemstöd inom informationshantering (t.ex. EDIT diarium, e-arkivet, Klara Dialog och andra regiongemensamma system).
* Ta emot och eskalera supportärenden via trafikförvaltningens Service Desk och till central förvaltning.
* Fånga upp behov och ställa krav på utformningen av den digitala arbetsplatsen för informationshantering.
* Genomföra tester av funktionalitet i regiongemensamma system.
* Samverka med andra verksamhetsspecialister inom regionen.
* Hantera administration såsom behörigheter och roller.
* Vissa administrativa uppgifter inom registrering kan förekomma.
* Kontakt med handläggare i verksamheten, systemanvändare, IT, Serviceförvaltningen, investeringsprojekt, registratorer och arkivarier.


**För att trivas och lyckas i rollen behöver du:**
 Tycka om att planera ditt arbete på ett strukturerat sätt, samtidigt som du har förmågan att anpassa dig när förutsättningarna förändras. Du gillar att tänka nytt, lösa problem och trivs med att samarbeta över olika delar av verksamheten. Din kommunikativa styrka, på svenska i både tal och skrift, gör att du kan skapa förståelse och bygga goda relationer. Här får du använda din förmåga att kombinera problemlösning med samarbete för att driva utveckling framåt.
   

  

**Krav:**
* Högskoleutbildning inom statsvetenskap, juridik, arkivkunskap eller offentlig förvaltning, alternativt yrkeshögskoleutbildning inom motsvarande områden, eller annan liknande utbildning som trafikförvaltningen bedömer som relevant
* Ett par års erfarenhet inom offentlig verksamhet, gärna som registrator eller annan roll inom informationshantering som trafikförvaltningen bedömer relevant
* Erfarenhet av att jobba i administrativa system inom diarieföring och arkiv
* Kunskap inom diarieföring och handlingsoffentlighet .


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet inom teknisk verksamhet så som infrastrukturprojekt, stadsbyggnad eller samhällsplanering
* Erfarenhet av att utbilda användare inom handlingsoffentlighet och/eller diarieföring.


**Det här erbjuder vi dig**
 På trafikförvaltningen har du möjlighet att växa och utvecklas för ett helt yrkesliv. Här kan du vara expert och fokusera på ditt sakområde. Samtidigt som du jobbar i ett lag och i en organisation med stor bredd. Det finns stora möjligheter att röra sig mellan olika roller och uppgifter. Du har utrymme att forma din egen karriärväg och stärka både din personliga och professionella utveckling i en spännande och varierad miljö!
   

  

 Vi är en välkomnande och öppen arbetsplats där vi stöttar och hjälper varandra. Vi vet att nyckeln för att vi ska klara vårt uppdrag – är medarbetare som trivs, mår bra och kan utvecklas på jobbet. Därför lägger vi stor vikt vid att säkerställa hållbarhet i vårt arbetssätt, bland annat genom att erbjuda flexibilitet i vardagen och hybridarbete när möjlighet finns.
   

  

 Årligen erbjuds hälsoundersökning och friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr. Hälsospåret, vår friskvårdssatsning, innehåller en rad olika hälsofrämjande aktiviteter. SL-kort är en annan uppskattad förmån hos oss. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Du ansöker med CV via vår hemsida, vi har inte möjlighet att ta emot ansökan via e-post. För att säkra objektiva bedömningar använder vi tester i samband med urval. Om du har några frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Arvid Strömberg, tfn 070-786 33 52. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, kontakta rekryterare Anna Papatziamos, tfn 070-786 35 46.
   

  

 Ansök redan i dag eftersom intervjuer kan ske löpande. Sista ansökningsdag är
 **2 april.** 
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Grundutredning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan komma att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Vissa tjänster ställer krav på svenskt medborgarskap samt omfattas av en säkerhetsprövningsintervju med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585).
   

  

 Provanställning kan komma att tillämpas och eventuella arbetsprov kan bli aktuella för tjänsten.
   

  

**Webb och sociala medier**
 För mer information om hur det är att jobba hos oss, besök vår karriärsida. Du hittar oss också på LinkedIn.

title: Senior Product Marketing Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
 We’re hiring a Senior Product Marketing Manager to own a core product area at Legora. The role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  

 This is a high-ownership, high-influence role for a top 1% PMM. You will operate as the strategic and executional leader of your product area—defining positioning and narrative, driving go-to-market strategy, influencing product direction, and delivering measurable adoption and revenue growth.
   

  

 You’ll partner closely with Product, GTM, and executive leadership to shape category-defining AI products. The role demands rare range: technical rigor, strategic clarity, and creative excellence. It offers the opportunity to do the best work of your career.
   

  

 What You’ll Own
   

  

 Narrative & Positioning
   

  

* Define clear, differentiated positioning from first principles
* Turn complex, AI-driven products into sharp, compelling customer value
* Establish a high bar for clarity, taste, and storytelling across every touchpoint


 Go-to-Market Strategy
   

  

* Lead end-to-end GTM for a core product area, from ideation through adoption
* Partner with Product, Marketing, GTM to shape what gets built and how it’s brought to market
* Ensure launches showcase Legora’s differentiated value that translate into pipeline and revenue


 Revenue Enablement
   

  

* Enable sales with world-class assets: pitches, demo narratives, one-pagers, competitive strategy
* Increase win rates and deal velocity through sharp differentiation
* Partner with Growth and Design to drive conversion across web, campaigns, and lifecycle


**Web Strategy**
* Own product storytelling across the website and key growth surfaces.
* Continuously optimize for clarity, differentiation, and conversion while maintaining narrative consistency across touchpoints.


 Market & Customer Intelligence
   

  

* Synthesize customer conversations, usage data, win/loss analysis, and competitive intelligence into actionable insight.
* Influence product prioritization and roadmap decisions


 What You Bring
   

  

* Experience: 6–8+ years in Product Marketing or Product Strategy in high-growth AI or B2B SaaS environments with a track record of marketing and driving adoption of AI products.
* Strategic Thinking: You operate from first principles, form strong points of view, and know how to separate durable signal from short-term noise.
* Leadership & Influence: Strong executive presence and ability to influence senior stakeholders. You lead those around you, challenge thinking, elevate quality, and provide clear strategic direction across Product and GTM teams.
* Storytelling & Craft: Outstanding writer and communicator with the ability to make technical, AI products feel clear, differentiated, and compelling.
* Technical Fluency: Strong grasp of technical AI concepts and the ability to engage credibly with Product and Engineering.
* Ownership & Drive: High agency, low ego, and a bias for action. You thrive in ambiguous, cross-functional environments and push work forward without waiting for perfect clarity.
* Creativity & Taste: You hold a high bar for messaging precision, product storytelling, and visual presentation. Details matter.
* Data-Driven Rigor: You use data to make decisions, measure impact, iterate quickly, and anchor outcomes.
* Speed & Quality: You move incredibly fast while delivering extremely high quality work. You don’t view speed and quality as tradeoffs.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Azure Cloud Specialist till Akademiska Hus
description:
Är du en erfaren Azure Cloud Specialist som vill bidra till en hållbar och modern IT-miljö inom en samhällsviktig verksamhet? Hos Akademiska hus får du arbeta med avancerad teknisk plattform i en organisation som kombinerar trygghet och långsiktighet med innovation och framtidstänk.
   

  

**Ditt uppdrag**
 Vi söker en erfaren specialist som kan ta ett huvudansvar och bli en nyckelperson i vår satsning på en smart och effektiv hybridmiljö. Du en del av vårt infrastrukturteam med hög teknisk kompetens där du kommer arbeta nära verksamheten och våra arkitekter för att implementera, drifta och utveckla vår molnbaserade infrastruktur, i både Azure och on-prem-miljö. Din roll är både operativ och strategisk där du säkerställer att vi använder Azure på ett effektivt, säkert och framtidssäkrat sätt.
   

  

 Du utgår från någon av Akademiska hus kontor, t.ex. .Göteborg, Stockholm, Uppsala etc., och rapporterar till Chef IT-Infrastrukltur. Vi tillämpar hybridarbete (ca 3 dagar i veckan på kontoret).
   

  

 Vi erbjuder dig möjligheten att arbeta med teknik i framkant genom vår avancerade tekniska plattform och smarta hybridmiljöer. Hos oss får du vara med och leda resan mot en riktig hybridmiljö.
   

  

**Din bakgrund och erfarenhet**
* Akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i liknande roller.
* Certifiering inom Microsoft Azure (t.ex. Azure Administrator Associate eller Security Engineer Associate).
* Vana vid att arbeta med hybridmiljöer, inklusive on-prem-infrastruktur.
* Färdigheter i PowerShell och hantering av Conditional Access-policys.
* Erfarenhet av Entra ID och Active Directory.


 För att lyckas i rollen krävs det att du har förmåga att ta ett ledande ansvar för Azure-infrastrukturen. Vi ser att du har mycket goda kunskaper inom Azure-plattformens kärnkomponenter: Compute, Nätverk, Lagring, Identitet, Säkerhet och Automation. Du har även erfarenhet av tjänster som Azure Virtual Desktop, Application Gateway och Application Proxy samt god kännedom om kostnadsstyrning i Azure.
   

  

 Utöver den tekniska expertisen krävs en god kommunikationsförmåga och att du behärskar både svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Du är en lagspelare som aktivt söker samarbete för att arbeta effektivt i team och med övriga intressenter. Vidare är du lösningsorienterad och ser möjligheter i utmaningar, samtidigt som du med hög initiativförmåga driver både dina egna projekt och dina kollegor framåt genom ett coachande och engagerande förhållningssätt.
   

  

**Meriterande**
* Kunskap inom DNS och Linuxmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Terraform eller annan Infrastructure as Code (IaC)-lösning.
* Kunskaper inom certifikatshantering, PKI, ADCS.
* Certifiering Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions.


**Vi erbjuder**
 Akademiska Hus är ett av Sveriges största fastighetsbolag. Vi utvecklar och förvaltar lokaler för högskolor och universitet och skapar förutsättningar för världsledande utbildning och forskning. Genom att även erbjuda labb och kontor för privata företag blir våra campus mer innovativa och hållbara platser, som främjar samverkan, kunskapsutveckling och kreativitet.
   

  

 Vi satsar på våra medarbetare och ser till att de växer. Alla har individuella uppdrag och vi erbjuder ledarutvecklingsprogram för chefer och projektledare. Att lära och tänka nytt är en del av vårt DNA. Genom ett gediget utbud av lärandetillfällen och utbildningar, samverkan och erfarenhetsutbyte utvecklas vi ständigt. Med bra chefer som ger oss förutsättningar, förtroende och mandat att leverera, utvecklas vi både som människor och bolag.
   

  

 Hållbarhet är ledstjärna i allt vi gör. Och hållbara blir vi tillsammans. Vi vet att våra medarbetare är avgörande för vår framgång och erbjuder därför alla olika typer av initiativ inom friskvård och hälsa.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om oss – ta en titt på vår FILM.
   

  

**Nyfiken?**
 Känns detta som en möjlighet för dig, ta chansen och sök nu! Urval kommer att ske löpande så vi ser fram emot din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
 *Har du frågor om tjänsten eller processen är du välkommen att kontakta Niklas Seger på niklas.seger@akademiskahus.se / I denna rekrytering samarbetar Akademiska Hus med Randstad. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Erik Perborn erik.perborn@randstad.se eller sophia.fredriksson@randstad.se om du har frågor.*
 Bakgrundskontroll kommer att genomföras på slutkandidater.
   

  

 Välkommen till en arbetsplats där dina idéer och initiativ värdesätts och där du kan vara med och forma framtiden!
