title: Senior Java developer
description:
**Är du en erfaren Javautvecklare som söker nya utmaningar?**
 Hos B3 Innovation får du möjligheten att arbeta i en miljö där innovation och samarbete står i fokus. Vi söker dig med djup kunskap inom Java och som trivs i en dynamisk och inkluderande arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Om rollen som Javautvecklare på B3 Innovation**
 Som utvecklare hos oss kommer du att:
   

  

* Utveckla högkvalitativa och skalbara lösningar.
* Samarbeta med ett tvärfunktionellt team av experter.
* Delta i design och arkitektur av nya system.


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har god erfarenhet och arbetat som utvecklare under en längre tid. Du som har hunnit både göra misstag och även lära av dem. Förhoppningsvis tycker du om att arbeta i team, dela med dig av dina kunskaper och vill fortsätta att lära dig nytt.
   

  

 Våra krav för att du ska passa i denna roll:
   

  

* Du behärskar svenska i tal och skrift.
* Du har minst 8 års erfarenhet av Javautveckling.
* Du har god kunskap att jobba med Java, Kotlin, Spring, Microservices (gärna i CI/CD-miljö)
* Du har god kunskap att jobba med olika ramverk som React, Angular och Vue.
* Du har ett öga för detaljer och brinner för att leverera kvalitativa lösningar.
* Du är bekväm med moderna utvecklingsmetoder som Agile och DevOps.
* Har du dessutom kunskaper inom Techlead blir vi extra glada!


 Varför B3 Innovation?
   

  

* Innovativ Kultur: Vi uppmuntrar kreativitet och nya idéer.
* Inkluderande miljö: Vi värdesätter mångfald och strävar efter en arbetsplats där alla känner sig välkomna.
* Balans och flexibilitet: Flexibilitet är centralt, vilket gör att du kan forma din arbetsdag för att få livspusslet att gå ihop. Vi förstår vikten av balans mellan arbete och fritid och erbjuder därför flexibla arbetstider.
* Gemenskap: Hos oss blir du en del av ett stöttande team som arbetar tillsammans för att nå gemensamma mål. Det handlar inte bara om “jobb jobb jobb” hos oss. Vi anordnar allt från tech-workshops till sociala aktiviteter som stickcaféer, spelkvällar och AW.


**Om B3 Innovation**
 Vi är kända för vårt fokus på innovation och förmåga att leverera värde till våra kunder. Genom att kombinera djup teknisk expertis med en stark förståelse för våra kunders verksamhet, skapar vi lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad. Vår kultur bygger på öppenhet, samarbete och en passion för teknik.
   

  

 Vi prioriterar personlig utveckling och erbjuder verktyg som B3 Academy, TechTalks och "Lunch & Learn" för att du ska kunna växa.
   

  

 Upptäck möjligheterna med B3 Innovation. Som utvecklare får du arbeta inom spännande branscher som media, bank och finans, energi, offentlig sektor, telekom och e-handel. Oavsett om du optimerar TV-sändningar, utvecklar digitala banktjänster eller skapar smarta hem, hjälper vi dig att hitta det perfekta uppdraget som matchar dina intressen.
   

  

 Våra toppbetyg i medarbetarundersökningar visar att nöjda kollegor är kärnan i vår framgång. Är du redo att kliva in i en miljö där utveckling och trivsel går hand i hand?
   

  

 Som sagt, välkommen till B3 Innovation – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

**Är du redo att ta nästa steg?**
 Skicka in din ansökan idag och bli en del av vårt engagerade och innovativa team!
   

  

 Om du är mer nyfiken på oss så kan du läsa mer om oss här: https://www.b3.se/innovation
   

  

 Om du har funderingar så hör gärna av dig till Kenneth Andersson på +46706678050 alternativt mail kenneth.andersson@b3.se

title: Senior mjukvaruutvecklare
description:
Vill du arbeta i ett globalt företag där du kan bidra till en mer hållbar livsmedelsproduktion? DeLaval är en ledande utvecklare, tillverkare och leverantör av lösningar för mjölkproducenter världen över. Som ett företag byggt på innovation arbetar vi ständigt för att hitta nya sätt att hjälpa våra kunder att göra mer med mindre.
   

  

 Nu söker ett av våra utvecklingsteam en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare som vill vara med och driva den fortsatta utvecklingen av våra embedded-lösningar.
   

  

**Roll och ansvarsområden**
 I vårt team arbetar vi med produktutveckling från idé till färdig lösning, samtidigt som vi kontinuerligt vidareutvecklar och förbättrar befintliga system och komponenter. Vi utvecklar huvudsakligen embedded programvara i Java, där kraven specificeras i Polarion och även utgör grunden för våra automatiserade testfall.
   

  

 Vi följer en agil arbetsmetodik med 10 veckors increment och 2 veckors sprintar för att säkerställa regelbundna leveranser och ett tydligt tempo i utvecklingsarbetet. Samarbete är en central del av vår vardag, och vi arbetar tätt med både kravteam och integrationstest för att skapa robusta och välfungerande lösningar.
   

  

 För att kvalitetssäkra våra produkter har vi tillgång till egna testmiljöer, och vid behov utför vi också tester på riktiga robotsystem ute på gårdar. Detta säkerställer att våra lösningar fungerar i verkliga miljöer och uppfyller kundernas behov på bästa sätt.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer:**
**För att lyckas i denna roll tror vi att du har:**
* Du är en lagspelare som är stolt över ditt arbete och strävar efter hög kvalitet.
* Du har tillräcklig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling för att kunna ta ett arkitektur ansvar.
* Du har en masterexamen inom datavetenskap eller motsvarande utbildning.
* Du trivs med att lösa komplexa problem och gillar nya utmaningar.
* Du behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Du har erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt.


**Det är också meriterande om du har:**
* Kunskap i Python, C eller C++ (används i äldre system).
* Erfarenhet av att skriva automatiserade testfall.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som Jira, Confluence, Polarion, NetBeans och Git.
* Kunskap inom code quality assurance-verktyg.

title: Doctoral student in Robotics and geometric machine learning
description:
**Project description**




**Third-cycle subject:** 
**Computer Science**




 The PhD student will work on robot learning and control algorithms that build on differential geometry and physics-informed priors to allow for data-efficient and safe robot motion generation and for robot manipulation with strong guarantees. We seek candidates who have experience in control and/or machine learning. 
   

  





**Supervision:** 
 Assistant Professor Noémie Jaquier is proposed to supervise the doctoral student. Decisions are made on admission
   

  





**Admission requirements**




 To be admitted to postgraduate education (Chapter 7, 39 § Swedish Higher Education Ordinance), the applicant must have basic eligibility in accordance with either of the following:
 


* passed a second cycle degree (for example a master's degree), or
* completed course requirements of at least 240 higher education credits, of which at least 60 second-cycle higher education credits, or
* acquired, in some other way within or outside the country, substantially equivalent knowledge



 In addition to the above, there is also a mandatory requirement for English equivalent to English B/6.
   

  





**Selection**




 In order to succeed as a doctoral student at KTH you need to be goal oriented and persevering in your work. During the selection process, candidates will be assessed upon their ability to:
 


* independently pursue his or her work
* collaborate with others,
* have a professional approach and
* analyze and work with complex issues.
* demonstrate experience with programming languages such as Python or C++.
* Background on differential geometry is an advantage
* Experience with real robots is an advantage



 After the qualification requirements, great emphasis will be placed on personal skills. 
   

  





**Target degree: Doctoral degree**




**Information regarding admission and employment**




 Only those admitted to postgraduate education may be employed as a doctoral student. The total length of employment may not be longer than what corresponds to full-time doctoral education in four years' time. An employed doctoral student can, to a limited extent (maximum 20%), perform certain tasks within their role, e.g. training and administration. A new position as a doctoral student is for a maximum of one year, and then the employment may be renewed for a maximum of two years at a time. In the case of studies that are to be completed with a licentiate degree, the total period of employment may not be longer than what corresponds to full-time doctoral education for two years.
   

  





 As a doctoral student, you are entitled to a workplace with many employee benefits and monthly salary according to KTH’s Doctoral student salary agreement. Read more about Doctoral studies (PhD) | KTH | Sweden.
   

  





**Union representatives**




 Contact information for
 
 union representatives.
   

  





**Doctoral Students`network (Students’ union on KTH Royal Institute of Technology)**




 Contact information for
 
 doctoral section.
   

  





**To apply for the position**




 Apply for the position and admission through KTH's recruitment system. It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure that the application is complete in accordance with the instructions in the advertisement.
   

  





 Applications must be received at the last closing date at midnight, CET/CEST (Central European Time/Central European Summer Time).
   

  





 Applications must include the following elements:
 


* CV including your relevant professional experience and knowledge.
* Application letter with a brief description of why you want to pursue research studies, about what your academic interests are, how they relate to your previous studies and future goals, and how they relate to the topics of the advertised position. (Maximum 2 pages long).
* Copies of diplomas and grades from previous university studies and certificates of fulfilled language requirements (see above). Translations into English or Swedish if the original document is not issued in one of these languages.Copies of originals must be certified.
* Representative publications or technical reports. For longer documents, please provide a summary (abstract) and a web link to the full text.



**Other information**




 For information about processing of personal data in the recruitment process.
   

  





 It may be the case that a position at KTH is classified as a security-sensitive role in accordance with the Protective Security Act (2018:585). If this applies to the specific position, a security clearance will be conducted for the applicant in accordance with the same law with the applicant's consent. In such cases, a prerequisite for employment is that the applicant is approved following the security clearance.
   

  





 We firmly decline all contact with staffing and recruitment agencies and job ad salespersons.
   

  





 Disclaimer:
 *In case of discrepancy between the Swedish original and the English translation of the job announcement, the Swedish version takes precedence.*




  
   

  





  
   

  





**Join us at KTH**
 KTH shapes the future through education, research and innovation. As a leading international technical university, we play an active role in advancing the transition towards a sustainable society. At KTH, you have the opportunity to grow and develop in a creative and dynamic environment, with good working conditions and attractive benefits. Equality, diversity and equal opportunities are essential to quality and form an integral part of KTH’s core values as a university and public authority.
   

  





 Learn more about our benefits and what it's like to work and grow at KTH

title: Senior Javautvecklare
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Är du en Senior Javautvecklare och vill förändra och förbättra samhället vi lever i? Här får du möjligheten. Just nu söker vi erfarna Javautvecklare till vårt team inom offentlig sektor i Stockholm!
   

  

 Som Javautvecklare på CGI kommer du erbjudas möjlighet att utvecklas som konsult både i lokala kundleveranser och i större globala åtaganden. Vårt arbetssätt bygger på närhet och långsiktiga kundrelationer. Vi vill vara våra kunders innovativa och proaktiva partner som hjälper dem att nå framgång i sin verksamhet.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Hos oss kommer du att ha spännande och varierande arbetsuppgifter. Du kommer att vara ansvarig för analys, systemdesign, utveckling och implementation av system och lösningar. Som konsult hos oss på CGI får du möjlighet att vara med och förändra på riktigt. Du får skapa lösningar tillsammans med våra kunder
   

  

 Vi förespråkar givetvis ett agilt arbetssätt och att arbeta tillsammans som team för att komma fram till bästa lösning. I rollen som konsult kan det både handla om att bli en del av våra kunders utvecklingsteam som att arbeta in-house på vårt CGI-kontor för våra kunder.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 I vårt team värdesätter vi engagemang och ambition och vi tycker att det är viktigt att du vill vara med och bidra till teamets gemensamma framgång.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är en teamspelare som både kan ge och ta i tekniska diskussioner såväl som förslag på lösningar. Vi ser också att det finns en vilja och nyfikenhet att lära sig nya saker, inte minst på teknisk nivå. Du är lyhörd och kan snabbt sätta dig in i kundens behov och hitta lämpliga lösningar.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har minst 5 års erfarenhet eller längre av utveckling i Java och har erfarenhet av agil systemutvecklingsmetodik.
 **För den här tjänsten behöver du även behärska svenska och i tal och skrift.**
**Vi ser gärna att du har kompetens inom något av följande:**
* Java
* Spring Boot
* IntelliJ, Eclipse, NetBeans
* Jenkins
* Kubernetes/Red Hat OpenShift
* Versionshantering
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD alt DevOps
* Arbetat med testautomatisering
* Arbetat med testdriven utveckling
* Goda kunskaper i Unix/Linux


 Låter det intressant? Kul! Vi ser fram emot att höra ifrån dig!
   

  

 Skicka in din ansökan redan i dag då urvalet sker löpande. Har du frågor om rollen, kontakta gärna Lina Fredriksson, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på lina.fredriksson@cgi.com.
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Doctoral student in visual analytics of cyber-physical systems
description:
**Project description**




**Third-cycle subject:** 
 computer science
   

  





 Problem: Cyber-physical systems (CPS) are inherently complex due to a tight coupling between software and hardware. Such systems affect our safety, so they must be trustworthy.
   

  





 In this project, we will develop a visual analytics tool to support the entire lifecycle of hardware-software co-design. By combining the timelines of data from models, hardware, and software, we provide engineers and domain experts a way to analyze them on a single platform.
   

  





 This visual analytics toolset will be the key component in being able to assess information across different levels of abstraction and at different phases in the life cycle.
   

  





 The first part Ph.D. thesis is done in conjunction with the European MONA LISA project, in which 15 consortium partners from three countries collaborate: https://www.monalisaio.com/
   

  





**Supervision:**

title: SAP BRIM Senior Application Professional | SEB Kort, Solna
description:
SEB Kort is looking for an experienced, technically strong, and driven
 **SAP BRIM Senior Application Professional** 
 to join our SAP Platform team.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to work in a collaborative and forward‑looking environment where you will help shape the next generation of billing, charging and invoicing solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Application Professional within SAP BRIM, you will play a key role in the development, configuration and continuous improvement of SEB’s SAP landscape. You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, architects and developers to translate business needs into scalable and sustainable SAP solutions.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Customising, development, testing and support (Dev/Ops approach) within the S/4HANA BRIM environment (SAP CC and SAP CI).
* Creating technical implementation concepts, including analysis, customisation and implementation.
* Supporting and advising business stakeholders in developing effective and future‑proof solutions.
* Driving standardisation and harmonisation of commercial business processes across the application lifecycle.
* Contributing to the innovation and sustainable development of new SAP processes.
* Analysing and resolving technical and application-related incidents and problems.
* Ensuring system compliance with regulatory and accounting requirements.


**Who We Are Looking For**
 To succeed in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* A degree in Computer Science or a comparable technical qualification.
* Several years of experience working with SAP BRIM, including customisation or consulting in CC and CI modules.
* Experience working with and enhancing complex SAP S/4HANA system landscapes.
* Experience from the financial industry or a large international corporate environment (meritorious).
* Knowledge of SAP Solution Manager, Confluence and Jira.
* Strong understanding of E2E SAP business processes.
* A solution‑oriented mindset, with strong analytical and problem‑solving skills.
* A high sense of responsibility, strong initiative and the ability to work independently.
* Strong team and communication skills, and the ability to thrive in environments undergoing change.
* Fluency in English; German is an advantage.


**What We Offer**
 Welcome to our inclusive culture, where our shared values inspire and uplift our team. We celebrate diversity and strive to ensure every employee feels seen, heard, and valued. We offer several experiences and benefits to our employees:
   

  

* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Excellent office environment
* Work-life balance


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **2** 
**9th of March, 2026** 
 . If you have questions about the position, please contact Olga Wohlfahrt, Talent Acquisition Partner, at olga.wohlfahrt@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Account Executive, DoiT Cloud Intelligence - EMEA North
description:
**Location**  

Our Account Executive will be an integral part of our New Business DoiT Cloud Intelligence (DCI) Sales team in EMEA. This role is based remotely in the **Netherlands or Sweden**.


**Who We Are**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.



Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.



With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

As an Account Executive for DoiT Cloud Intelligence (DCI), you will apply best-in-class pipeline generation techniques to identify new prospects across the Startup, Digital Native and Enterprise segment. You will be responsible for solution pitching, end-to-end deal management, negotiations and closing complex technical partnerships. Using your passion and knowledge of both DoiT's services and the customers chosen cloud technology, you will drive expansion of the business.


**Responsibilities**


* Own the full sales cycle, consistently hitting (and exceeding) quota and pipeline targets.
* Develop and execute a regional strategy to identify high-growth opportunities and untapped markets.
* Cultivate deep, symbiotic relationships with AWS Sales Leaders and Partner Managers to co-sell and maximize market share.
* Partner with our Forward Deployed Engineers and Solutions Architects to solve "unsolvable" technical hurdles for prospects.
* Maintain a rigorous standard for forecast accuracy in Salesforce and ensure all proposals reflect DoiT's high-caliber brand.
* Guide customers from initial curiosity to successful contract execution, ensuring a world-class onboarding experience.
* Work hand-in-hand with Marketing and BDR teams to fuel demand generation, from campaign conception to post-launch analysis.
* Travel with purpose (30-50%) to engage with AWS teams, attend industry events, and meet customers face-to-face.


**Qualifications**


* BA/BS degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3-5 years of full sales cycle experience (preferably in a New business focussed role) in the technology industry with SaaS, PaaS or IaaS products and platforms.
* A proven track record of selling **cloud services** and understanding the nuances of consumption-based models.
* Consistent record of meeting and exceeding sales quotas
* High degree of self-discipline and experience of using CRM systems and sales forecasting
* Technically minded, with an in-depth understanding of the technology and cloud computing market, and a passion for AWS products.
* You are an entrepreneur at heart—independent, curious, and tenacious. You don't just wait for leads; you create them.
* Ability to build influential relationships within a matrixed environment and grow social circles that turn into partnerships.
* Self-organized, Goal-oriented, self-motivated individual who is confident, thorough and tenacious
* Analytical, Data-driven, detail-oriented and able to "zoom" in/out from the big picture to the minutiae.
* Ability to effectively operate flexibly and independently in a fast-paced, constantly evolving team environment.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills in English. Fluent communication in **Dutch or Swedish**, both written and verbal.
* A great sense of humor and enjoys having fun at work


**Bonus Points**


* Regional network and relationships with Startups, VC and Technology communities.
* Proven experience selling AWS cloud products/services.
* Cloud Certifications
* Additional languages.


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: Sr. Principal Consultant (Global position)
description:
### **General information**

Country
Sweden
City
Remote Location
Job ID
48015
Department
Infor Consulting Services
Experience Level
MID\_SENIOR\_LEVEL
Employment Status
FULL\_TIME
Workplace Type
Hybrid
### **Description & Requirements**

The Senior Principal ERP Consultant is responsible for leading complex ERP implementation projects and providing strategic guidance to clients to ensure successful ERP system deployment. This senior role involves managing high-profile client relationships, overseeing large-scale projects, and driving process optimization across various business functions. The Principal ERP Consultant also provides thought leadership and mentors junior consultants, contributing to the growth of the consulting practice. You will be the M3 Techno functional domain expert to provide inputs/ guidelines for highly complex or High Priority cases. **A Day in the Life Typically Includes:*** Lead and manage complex ERP implementation projects, ensuring alignment with client business objectives and project goals
* Collaborate with senior client stakeholders to understand business requirements and design strategic ERP solutions
* Oversee ERP system configuration, customization, and optimization to meet client-specific needs
* Develop and execute test plans, ensuring the system meets business requirements and quality standards
* Advise clients on ERP best practices and strategies to enhance system performance and optimize business processes
* Manage project risks and issues, ensuring timely resolution and project success
* Mentor junior consultants, providing guidance on complex project tasks and career development

 **Basic Qualifications**  

* Experience leading ERP implementation projects and managing large-scale client engagements
* ERP systems and business processes experience across areas such as finance, HR, or supply chain
* Experience collaborating with senior leadership and clients to develop and implement strategic ERP solutions
* Experience with system configurations, customizations, and troubleshooting technical challenges
* Experience in business process optimization and providing strategic ERP advisory services
 **Preferred Qualifications*** Experience with cloud-based ERP systems or SaaS solutions
* Experience with advanced integration tools and platforms (e.g., middleware, EDI)
* Experience with project management methodologies such as Agile or Waterfall
* Certifications in ERP systems or project management
* Industry-specific ERP implementation and best practices experience
  

  

**About Infor**  

Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn’t just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you’re not just building a career. you’re helping to build what’s next.  

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business-wide digital transformation.  

For more information visit www.infor.com  


**Our Values**  

At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship & compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self-actualization.  

We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.  

Infor is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. Infor does not discriminate against candidates or employees because of their sex, race, gender identity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, veteran status, or any other protected status under the law. If you require accommodation or assistance at any time during the application or selection processes, please submit a request by following the directions located in the FAQ section. **Fraud Awareness**  

We have been made aware of unauthorized individuals posing as Infor recruiters, including some who have made fraudulent offers of employment. Please read our guidelines and protect yourself from recruitment scams. **Fraud Privacy Policy**  

We value your privacy at Infor.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in e-health with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our e-health solutions supports health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.

**The position**


Cambio is the creator of the largest electronic health record (EHR) in Sweden with our product Cosmic. It is in use in the vast majority of Swedens regions and comes in two different forms. Among other ways it's provided as a service (SaaS) to some of our customers. We are now looking for a System Engineer who wants to join our IT infrastructure and Operations team, being part of deploying and improving the infrastructure that is used by Cosmic. This is a critical component for many of the regions in Sweden and you'll be a part in supporting our healthcare customer’s important work.


As a System Engineer, you will be responsible for server management of the technical infrastructure that supports our products and services. As part of the server management function, you will work closely with other functions within IT Infrastructure and Operations, to ensure that all servers are well maintained in line with strategy and well-coordinated with activities such as the deployment of new services or upgrades. You will work with both Windows and Linux servers.

 **You will also:**

* Active Directory, and other critical components.
* Work with automation using Ansible and scripting.
* Ensure that servers and applications run smoothly and are up to date.
* Perform version upgrades and security updates.
* Communicate with vendors and manage licenses for applications.
* Participate in strategic planning and operational work related to patching and maintenance.
**We offer:**

* **Be part of an evolving technology landscape** - You will join us on a journey towards a more modern and flexible infrastructure setup. The focus is on continuous improvement, standardisation and moving towards more scalable and futureproof solutions.
* **Focus on automation and smart operations -** We are looking to reduce manual work and increase efficiency through automation and scripting. You will have the opportunity to improve existing processes and help build more reliable and maintainable operational workflows.
* **A modern platform and container technologies -** As part of our ongoing development, you will be involved in initiatives related to modern application platforms and container technologies. This role offers a solid foundation for growing within platform, infrastructure or cloud engineering.
* **Strong learning and development opportunities -** You will have access to continuous learning through training, knowledge sharing and handson experience. As the technical environment evolves, there are clear opportunities to develop both your technical skills and your professional profile.

###### **About you**


You are an experienced system engineer with a strong technical foundation and an ability to take ownership of complex projects. You thrive on both hands-on work and strategic planning, leveraging your expertise to manage and deploy scalable, secure, and reliable systems.


Your background includes extensive experience in managing different platforms and operating systems. You have a proactive mindset, are highly organized, and can manage multiple priorities while maintaining attention to detail. Above all, you are driven to solve problems and deliver impactful results.


At Cambio, we value initiative and personal growth. Our culture is built on Trust, Care, and Together—values we believe are important to both our work and our people. It’s important to us that you recognize and identify with these values.

 **Requirements**

* Several years’ experience working with server and application management.
* Strong knowledge of Linux and Windows environments.
* Experience with infrastructure automation and scripting
* Experience working with Microsoft Azure, including security and identity services such as Azure Arc, Microsoft Defender for Cloud, and Microsoft Entra
* Strong communication skills in both Swedish and English.

**It's a bonus if you**

* Have good understanding of certificate management, PKI, and related security standards
* Experience working with container orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes or Red Hat OpenShift
* Experience using a CMDB as a central source for managing and tracking changes in IT environments.
* Experience with monitoring tools and frameworks, e.g., Grafana or Dynatrace
**Additional information:**

 **Place of employment**: Linköping or Stockholm

**Scope**: Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)

**Form of employment:** Permanent employment, 6 months trial period

**Additional Information:** The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.


We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.  

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**

title: Tech Lead Azure Cloud och Modern Workplace till Kommuninvest
description:
Vi söker för kunds räkning. För att ansöka till tjänsten, vänligen besök https://karriarguiden.se/sv/jobb/tech-lead-azure-cloud-modern-workplace-till-kommuninvest. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
  
  

Vill du vara den som sätter riktning för en modern, säker och kostnadseffektiv IT-miljö – och samtidigt kunna gå ner på djupet när det behövs? Nu söker vi en Tech Lead inom Azure Cloud och Modern Workplace som vill vara med och slutföra vår molnresa, minska konsultberoendet och utveckla vår tekniska plattform för framtiden.
  
  

Kommuninvest är ett medlemsägt kreditmarknadsbolag som erbjuder svenska kommun- och regionkoncerner konkurrenskraftig och hållbar lånefinansiering av bland annat bostäder, infrastruktur, skolor och sjukhus. Tillsammans får vi bättre lånevillkor än var och en för sig. Sedan starten 1986 har Kommuninvest sparat miljardbelopp åt medlemmarna i form av lägre räntor. För närvarande är 297 kommuner och regioner medlemmar i denna frivilliga samverkan. Med en balansomslutning på cirka 600 miljarder kronor är Kommuninvest kommun- och regionsektorns största kreditgivare.
  
  

Hos oss får du en nyckelroll där du kombinerar strategi och arkitektur med ett tydligt hands-on-inslag . Du kommer vara en teknisk vägvisare som andra vänder sig till för råd, beslut och framdrift – och du gillar att testa, labba och förstå tekniken på riktigt.
  
Om rollen
  
Som Tech Lead Azure Cloud och Modern Workplace har du ett övergripande ansvar för att forma och utveckla Kommuninvests IT-infrastruktur (cloud och on-prem) samt modern workplace. Rollen är bred – men med tydlig tyngdpunkt: ungefär 60% strategiskt (arkitektur, principer, roadmap, rådgivning) och 40% operativt nära (hands-on, validering, teknisk coachning, stöd i komplexa frågor).
  
  

Du blir en del av Infrastruktur och Drift (IochD), ett sammansvetsat team med hög kompetens, låg prestige och starkt driv att bygga smarta, hållbara lösningar.
  
  

**Ansvarsområden/Arbetsuppgifter:****Du kommer bland annat att:**  

* Sätta teknisk riktning och ta fram arkitektur, lösningsdesign och principer för Azurecloud och modern workplace
* Bidra till och driva roadmap för vår fortsatta modernisering (on-prem → cloud)
* Fungera som teknisk mentor och rådgivare till teamet och vara “go-to” i Azurearkitektur- och infrastrukturfrågor samt M365/Identity.
* Stödja avdelningen i att utveckla arbetssätt, kompetens och lösningar.
* Arbeta med kostnadsoptimering (FinOps) och hjälpa oss ta kontroll över molnkostnader och footprint
* Stärka security-by-design i allt vi gör, i nära samverkan med informationssäkerhetsfunktionen
* Bidra till att automatisera och effektivisera centrala processer (ex. identiteter, konton, behörigheter och ITSM-flöden)
* Samarbeta med externa leverantörer (ex. MDR) och driva kvalitet i leveranser, kontroller och övervakning


**Kvalifikationer:****Vi söker dig som har:**  

* Flerårig erfarenhet i roll inom Azure cloud och/eller Modern Workplace (vi tänker senior nivå – men bedömer helheten)
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arkitektur och lösningsdesign, inklusive att ta fram principer/riktlinjer och vägval
* God förståelse för att arbeta i miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet, stabilitet och spårbarhet


Tekniskt ser vi gärna att du har expertis i två av områdena nedan och god bredd i övriga:
  
* Microsoft Azure
* Microsoft Entra (Identity och Access)
* Microsoft Intune / Endpoint
* Microsoft 365
* Microsoft Defender / säkerhetslösningar i Microsoft-ekosystemet


**Meriterande:**  

* Erfarenhet från finans eller annan verksamhet med tydliga regulatoriska krav
* ITIL/ITSM-erfarenhet (incident/change, ärendehantering, arbetssätt)
* Erfarenhet av kostnadsstyrning i moln (FinOps)


Certifieringar är meriterande, men inget krav. Vi värderar praktisk erfarenhet och förmågan att använda kunskap i vardagen.
  
  

Tjänsten kräver mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i både tal och skrift, då rollen innebär kommunikation och dokumentation på svenska.
  
  

**Vem är du:**  

Du är en person som vågar ta ställning, förklara dina val och skapa förtroende. Du trivs i en roll där du både kan jobba långsiktigt och samtidigt vara nära tekniken. Du är prestigelös, trygg i samarbeten och gillar att få andra att lyckas.
  
  

**Det är viktigt att du:**  

* Tycker om att utforska ny teknik (testa, sätta upp, förstå) – men du behöver inte göra all produktion-implementation själv
* Kan översätta teknik till begriplighet och få genomslag i en organisation med många kontaktytor
* Har ett naturligt säkerhetstänk: säkerhet ska finnas med i varje beslut, inte vara en separat aktivitet


Vad får du• En strategiskt viktig roll med stor påverkan i en organisation med tydligt samhällsuppdrag
  
* Möjlighet att vara med och slutföra vår molnresa och bygga långsiktigt hållbara lösningar
* Ett prestigelöst team där man hjälper varandra och där teknikintresse uppskattas


Som medarbetare på Kommuninvest blir du en del av ett bolag med ett tydligt samhällsuppdrag – att finansiera hållbar utveckling i Sveriges kommuner och regioner. Hos oss arbetar du i en kunskapsintensiv miljö där kvalitet, ansvar och samarbete genomsyrar allt vi gör.
  
  

Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftig lön , trygga anställningsvillkor och förmånliga försäkrings- och pensionslösningar enligt kollektivavtal. Du får...

title: CRM Manager, Ellos
description:
#### **Om oss**


Ellos Group är en ledande nordisk shoppingdestination för heminredning och mode med onlinebutikerna Ellos, Jotex och Homeroom samt betalvarumärket Elpy. I nära relation med våra miljontals kunder utvecklar vi attraktiva och hållbara erbjudanden för kvinnan mitt i livet, hennes familj och hem. Med innovation, kreativitet och hållbarhet söker vi ständigt nya vägar i stort och smått, och alltid med kunden i fokus. Ellos Group, med huvudkontor i Borås, är verksamt i samtliga nordiska länder och på utvalda marknader i Europa. Ellos Group har ca 500 medarbetare och omsätter runt 3,5 miljarder SEK.

#### **Om rollen**

#### **CRM Manager – Retention & Lifecycle Strategy**

**Location:** Borås (Hybrid available)


Are you a technical CRM strategist who thrives on building complex, automated customer journeys? Ellos is a pure-play e-commerce leader looking for a **CRM Manager** to own the strategic lifecycle of our global customer base.


In this role, you are the architect of our **Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)**. You will bridge the gap between Marketing, Data/BI, and Tech to ensure every touchpoint, Email, SMS, or Push is personalised, and high-impact is automated. You will report directly to the CMO and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and our platform service providers.

**Your Strategic Mission**


As the strategic owner of the customer relationship, your primary objective is to drive long-term loyalty. You will transform behavioural insights into highly sophisticated, data-driven communication growth while acting as the guardian of our MarTech stack and data integrity.

* **Lifecycle Ownership:** Define and manage the end-to-end journey, including triggers for onboarding, activation, loyalty, and churn prevention.
* **Automation Mastery:** Lead the optimisation of complex marketing journeys using **Bloomreach**. You’ll ensure the right message reaches the right customer via Email, SMS, or Push at the perfect moment.
* **Data-Driven Growth:** Utilise advanced segmentation and A/B testing to convert behavioural insights into measurable revenue growth and repeat purchase rates.
* **Technical Governance:** Act as the bridge between Marketing and IT to secure data quality, tracking, and seamless API integrations within our MarTech stack.

**Core Responsibilities**

* **Strategy & Lifecycle Ownership:** Define the end-to-end journey. From onboarding and activation to churn prevention and win-back, you own the roadmap that keeps our customers coming back.
* **Automation & Multi-Channel Excellence:** Lead the development of advanced automated flows across Email, SMS, and Push. You ensure the right message hits the right device at the optimal time.
* **Advanced Segmentation & Personalisation:** Partner with our Data/BI teams to build value-based segmentation models. You’ll implement dynamic product recommendations and tailored offers that feel personal, not robotic.
* **Data-Driven Growth:** You live in the KPIs. You will monitor Repeat Purchase Rates, CLV, and Conversion, using rigorous A/B testing to constantly move the needle.
* **Technical Governance & GDPR:** Act as the bridge to IT to ensure data quality and system integrations. You are responsible for GDPR compliance, consent management, and the ethical handling of our most valuable asset: customer data.
* **Cross-Functional Leadership:** Coordinate with E-commerce, Content, and CS to align our brand voice. You’ll report CRM insights directly to senior management to inform high-level business decisions.

**Your Background & Experience**


You are a mix of a data strategist and a technical project manager. You don't just see "users"; you see patterns and opportunities. You have 5+ years in Customer Engagement, preferably in Fashion retail or e-commerce

**Technical & Professional Requirements**


We are looking for a candidate who can "speak data" as fluently as they "speak brand."

* **Advanced Platform Experience:** Proven track record managing complex CRM/CDP ecosystems (specifically **Bloomreach Engagement**, **Braze**, or **HubSpot Enterprise**). You should be comfortable with technical architecture and integrating these tools with Data Warehouses and ERPs.
* **Data Analytics:** Proficiency in **SQL, Power BI, or Tableau**. You should be comfortable using **Power BI** or **Tableau** to perform predictive modelling and prove the direct impact of retention flows on the company’s P&L.
* **Compliance Expert:** Expert-level knowledge of **GDPR** and data privacy frameworks.


You will be the guardian of our customer consent framework.

* **Commercial Mindset:** Ability to link CRM activities to financial outcomes. You don’t just report on Open Rates; you report on **incremental margin and CLV**.
* **Leadership:** Experience coaching junior staff and leading cross-functional projects (Marketing, Finance, and Tech).
* **Education:** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Data Science, IT, or Business Administration.
* **Strategic Leadership:** Experience leading large-scale shifts, such as platform migrations or implementing a "customer-first" culture.

**Preferred Certifications:**

* **Platform Specific:** Bloomreach Academy, Salesforce Marketing Cloud Consultant, or Braze Certified.
* **Strategy & CX:** CCXP (Certified Customer Experience Professional) or PCM.
* **Management:** PMP (Project Management Professional) for leading large-scale technical migrations.

**Your Skill Set & Personal traits**

* **Strategic & Operational Sharpness:** You possess a unique "zoom-in/zoom-out" capability—equally comfortable defining the long-term CRM vision as you are diving into the technical nuances of a complex customer journey.
* **Influential Communicator:** You are a compelling presenter and communicator, capable of translating complex data insights into actionable strategies that influence and align stakeholders across Marketing, Tech, and Finance.
* **High-Performance Execution:** Highly organised and detail-oriented, you thrive in fast-paced e-commerce environments where managing multiple high-impact initiatives simultaneously is the norm.
* **Collaborative Mindset:** You are a true team player who values knowledge sharing and collective growth, acting as a bridge between departments to ensure a unified customer experience.
* **Proactive Ownership:** You are self-driven and hold yourself to a high standard of excellence, taking full accountability for the quality and performance of every automated flow and campaign.
* **Nordic Market Expertise:** You possess a deep understanding of the Nordic consumer landscape and are fluent in a Scandinavian language (Swedish, Norwegian, or Danish) as well as English.

**Why Join Ellos?**


At Ellos, we don’t just follow trends – we set them. You’ll join a team that’s ambitious, data-savvy, and relentlessly focused on delivering great customer experiences through impactful marketing. You’ll have a high level of ownership, direct influence on strategy, and the freedom to innovate across our media landscape.


Do you want to shape the digital workplace of the future with us? Please submit your application as soon as possible via the link, we do not accept applications via email. Selection is ongoing and the position may be filled before the application period expires. Our recruitment process is strictly competency-based, so we ask that you do not attach photos or include your age in your application.


We look forward to getting to know you.

**How to apply**


Join us in shaping the future of e-commerce loyalty.


It is an ongoing recruitment and the **last application date is the 31st March 2026.**


With us, you are part of an innovative team that is building the e-commerce and workplace of the future. Our culture is characterized by the values Humble Winners, Entrepreneurship and Joy - an environment where every employee can grow, challenge themselves and contribute to development. You are given the opportunity to challenge established processes and work with both stability and innovation as a foundation.


Within Ellos Group, we strive to offer an inclusive workplace where everyone feels respected and welcome. All job seekers and employees are treated equally regardless of gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, age, disability or other factors.


Sista ansökningsdag: 31 mars  

Placering: Borås

title: Security Engineer
description:
**Security Engineer**
---------------------


Är du nyfiken, självgående och brinner för cybersäkerhet? Vi söker Security Engineers som trivs i kundnära uppdrag, tar ägarskap och omsätter komplexa utmaningar till hållbara, säkra lösningar.

**Om oss**  

Vi hjälper privata och offentliga företag och organisationer att bygga ett säkrare digitalt samhälle genom strategisk rådgivning och avancerade säkerhetslösningar. Hos oss arbetar du med ledande teknik, kunniga kollegor och ambitiösa, stora kunder.

**Din roll**  

Som Security Engineer designar, implementerar och vidareutvecklar du säkra nätverks- och plattformslösningar. Du kombinerar tekniskt hantverk med ett konsultativt arbetssätt och hjälper kunder att göra rätt val i arkitektur, processer och prioriteringar.

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**

* Nätverkssäkerhetsarkitektur och design samt segmentering
* Cloud- och hybridmiljöer: säker nätverksarkitektur i AWS/Azure/GCP
* Härdning och granskning, konfigurations- och regelverksgranskning samt städning/tuning av ex brandväggsregler
* Loggning och övervakning: nätverks- och brandväggsloggar
* Rådgivning och förändringsledning: workshops, roadmaps, beslutsunderlag, dokumentation och kunskapsöverföring

**Din profil**


Vi söker dig som har teknisk kompetens inom cybersäkerhet. Du har djup kunskap inom något av eller flera av dessa områden:

* Workspace security (t ex MS Defender E5, MS Intune, Palo Coretex, Sentinel One)
* Säker anslutning, SSE/SASE och remote access (t ex Palo Alto, Zscaler, Cloudflare, Check Point, Cyolo)
* Brandväggs- och nätverkssäkerhet (Palo Alto, Check Point, Zscaler, AlgoSec, Fortinet)
* Identitet och åtkomst (MS Entra, MS AD, Cyberark, Cloudflare
* Nätverkssäkerhet i cloud miljöer (AWS/Azure/GCP) och säker anslutning i hybridmiljöer.
* Applikationssäkerhet och AI


Du har förmågan att leda tekniskt arbete i kundmiljöer, från designstadie till införande. För att vara framgångsrik i konsultrollen behöver du vara kommunikativ, nyfiken på att lära dig nytt och ha lätt för att bygga förtroende hos kund.


Det är meriterande med certifieringar som CCNP Security/PCNSE/NSE/JNCIS‑SEC, CISSP, GIAC (t.ex. GCIA/GCIH), CCSA/CCSE/CCSM.

**Varför oss**

* En prestigelös Challengerkultur där du uppmuntras ta egna initiativ och kan påverka din egen och företagets utveckling
* Ett företag med hög kompetens inom cybersäkerhet och där du får kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar och certifieringar
* En arbetsplats där vi hjälper varandra och jobbar för kunskapsdelning och kompetensöverföring
* Spännande kunder och projekt där du får en viktig roll i att driva cybersäkerhetsresan och därmed bidra till ett säkrare digitalt Sverige

**Praktiskt**


Då denna tjänst kräver att vi jobbar mot kunder som innebär att du behöver säkerhetsprövas har vi därmed krav på svenskt medborgarskap. Flytande i både engelska och svenska är ett krav.


Vi genomför bakgrundskontroller för alla våra rekryteringar, mer detaljer informeras om i intervjusteg.


Sista ansökningsdag är den 20 april men vi jobbar med löpande urval och kan komma tillsätta rollen innan sista ansökningsdag så vänta inte med din ansökan.


Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
company_description: Orange is one of the world’s leading telecommunications operators : sales of 42,3 billion euros in 2020 and 142,000 employees in 26 countries.

title: QA Engineer
description:
*We're at a pivotal moment for both Tibber and the planet. When joining Tibber, you won’t just help scale a forward-thinking tech company – you’ll contribute to a real shift in how people consume electricity. With millions of smart devices connected to the Tibber platform (like electric vehicles and smart thermostats), we have one of the most unique energy trading portfolios on the market.*

*We’re looking for a QA Engineer to join us in making the energy transition happen – maybe that’s you?*

**Job Mission**

As a Quality Engineer at Tibber, you won’t just be finding bugs; you’ll help build the machinery that prevents them. You will play a pivotal role in designing the technical infrastructure and cultural frameworks that allow Tibber to scale without friction.


Your goal is to ensure our engineers have the tools, environments, and automated workflows needed to ship world-class software with confidence. You aren't a gatekeeper, you are an accelerator. With a strong focus on the overlap of quality and developer experience, you will help our teams stay productive, even as complexity grows.

**What you'll do**

* **Strategise & Influence:** Work closely with engineering leadership to identify high-impact areas and ensure quality efforts are focused where they matter most.
* **Architect Test Environments:** Own and evolve our test environments in collaboration with engineering teams, ensuring they are stable, reproducible, and scalable.
* **Build the Foundation:** Collaborate with the Cloud Platform and DevEx team to build quality support systems that scale across a distributed architecture.
* **Full-Stack Automation:** Design and maintain automated testing frameworks that support our diverse ecosystem - from high-throughput backends and GraphQL schemas to web frontends and native mobile apps.
* **Preach the Quality Gospel:** Actively mentor engineers and leaders to instill a "Shift Left" mindset. You’ll help teams establish the standards and metrics needed to own quality throughout the entire development cycle.

**What we're looking for**


You are driven by impact and used to fast-paced environments, and you thrive when given clear goals and high accountability. The areas below summarises our ideal candidate:

* **The Polyglot Mindset:** You are comfortable jumping into different codebases. Whether it's a microservice in .NET or a mobile component in Swift, you can understand the logic and work with the engineers to find the best ways to test it.
* **CI/CD Native:** You have deep experience with CI/CD technologies and understand how infrastructure supports (or hinders) quality.
* **The Evangelist:** You love teaching others and bridging the gap between technical excellence and business impact. You can convince a busy developer that a robust integration test today saves a weekend of on-call duty, but you can just as easily articulate the ROI of quality to a PM or business stakeholder.
* **The Self-Starter:** You have the autonomy to identify gaps and the initiative to close them. You don't wait for a ticket; you see a bottleneck and you build a bypass.
* **The Orchestrator:** You are your own best Project Manager. You know how to break down complex architectural goals - like migrating a test suite or spinning up a new staging environment - into actionable milestones. You can manage your own backlog, prioritize ruthlessly based on business risk, and keep stakeholders informed without needing a PM to tail you. You don’t just start projects; you drive them to the finish line.
* **The Quality Scientist:** You don’t guess; you hypothesise, test, and measure. You are obsessed with observability and data **-** not just for production uptime, service performance or where we find bugs, but as a "microscope" into the health of our output. You have a natural curiosity for identifying new ways to measure quality and impact, turning "technical hunches" into hard, reproducible data.

**‍️‍️The Tibber Mindset**


Tibber is not your typical energy supplier. Our tech helps hundreds of thousands of households lower and shift their energy consumption to more sustainable and affordable hours. We’re here to accelerate the energy transition – not in theory, but in everyday life.


Being on a mission to change an industry, fundamentally also means being prepared for the unexpected. We do what others say can’t be done, try and fail together but never lose sight of our users. We work passionately with sustainability and a circular approach, both with our own products and in the entire ecosystem that is affected by everything we do.


Starting out with two passionate founders in 2016, we're now 300+ people working for Tibber in our offices in Stockholm, Førde, Berlin, Amsterdam, and Oslo. We will continue to grow within our markets, and we are thrilled to be backed by investors like Balderton Capital, Eight Roads Ventures, Founders Fund, Summa, and Schibsted.

*Diversity of thought fuels better products, so we welcome applicants of every background, identity and lived experience. Ready to be part of powering the energy transition?* ***Apply below!***

title: Engineering Manager - Product & Cloud Ops
description:
At Playground Tech, we're at a vital tipping point. Our product is proven, our customer base is surging, and our engineering team is about to go from 5 to 30 people over the next 12 months.


Until now, our CTO has led the team alongside everything else. It worked when we were tiny, but to hit our next phase, we need dedicated leadership. We need someone whose entire mission is to scale the team without breaking the high-performing and humble culture that got us here.


To be clear: nothing is on fire. This isn’t a turnaround job or a rescue mission. It’s about taking a healthy, hungry team and ensuring it survives rapid growth. You’ll be maintaining velocity, ownership, and quality while tripling the headcount.


The timing is unique: you’re early enough to know everyone by name and shape the engineering culture.

### **What you'll do**


Your job is to own the growth of the team and make the transition from "startup crew" to "engineering organization" feel intentional, rather than chaotic.

* **Build the Squad:** Your most urgent task is partnering with Talent Acquisition to find, sell, and onboard world-class engineers at a pace that doesn't disrupt our flow.
* **Support Autonomy:** Our engineers own their problems. You step in when they’re stuck, not before.
* **"Just Enough" Structure:** You’ll introduce lightweight processes—retros, on-call rotations, incident reviews—as we grow. The goal is "just enough" structure to keep us moving, not a corporate rulebook.
* **Develop Talent:** Our team ranges from fresh grads to 10+ year veterans. You’ll need a versatile coaching style to keep the juniors growing and the seniors challenged.
* **The Leadership Triangle:** You’ll work in a tight loop with Martin (PM) and Sebbe (CTO). This isn't a non-technical manager bossing around engineers; it’s three technical minds driving the business with short feedback loops and zero hierarchy.
* **Team Health:** In a fast-growing team, small cracks can become canyons quickly. You’ll catch risks like burnout or misalignment early and act before it escalates.
### **Who are you?**


You’ve lived through the chaos of scaling a small tech team. You know exactly what breaks at fifteen engineers, and you know how to fix it without over-complicating things.

* A Context-Setter: You lead by removing obstacles, not by micromanaging. The best sign of your success? Strong engineers choose to stay in your teams when things get difficult.
* Low Ego, High Impact: You bring patterns and experience, but you don't show up with a "this is how we did it at [Big Tech Co]" attitude. You adapt to the team, not the other way around.
* The Technical Bar: You don't have write production code, but your technical background allows you to support team members through the quality of your questions and your architectural judgment. You are comfortable discussing Kubernetes, Pulumi, ArgoCD, and Multicloud (AWS, Azure, GCP).
**Skills & Background:**

* A hands-on technical background as an engineer (CloudOps, IaaS, SRE, or Developer).
* Proven experience as a manager during a significant scaling journey.
* A background in infrastructure or platform engineering is a plus, but leadership quality from a strong SaaS/Product environment wins every time.
* Fluency in Swedish is a very-nice-to-have and English is a must.
### **Why Playground?**


We are in an intense growth phase, but we refuse to become a corporate bureaucracy. We hire experts and get out of their way. We minimise the work around the work — no death-by-meeting culture, no process for the sake of process. The stack is modern: ArgoCD, Trivy, Falco, Golang, and the major clouds. You report directly to the PMO + CTO and will have real ownership and autonomy to shape how this function operates.  

  

If you have spent the last few years wondering what it would feel like to build something from the ground up in a company that actually means it when they say they value speed, simplicity, and people — let’s talk.

### **Let's Play!**


Applying to us is a breeze!


Upload your resumé or use your Linkedin profile.


Answer the choice-questions (no "please-rewrite-your-resume" nonsense, promise).


Feel free to include links to your portfolio, GitHub or similar if you have stuff you're proud of that you want to share with us.

###### **Note:**


Playground Group does not provide visa sponsorship or relocation support.


Applicants must already have a permanent and independent right to work in Sweden.

### **Welcome to Playground!**


At Playground, you work on real, complex assignments for well-established and ambitious clients, not bench projects or short-lived experiments. Our teams are trusted with production systems, platforms, and data that actually matter. Here growth comes from ownership, curiosity, and doing the work properly. You’re trusted to think, contribute, and keep getting better, one meaningful step at a time.


Playground brings together specialized domains under one umbrella, with a shared culture and way of working, and easy access to broad technical expertise when it helps move the work forward.


Buzz: Manager, Cloud, Platform, Development Manager, Tech Lead, CTO, CloudOps, Sverige

title: IT Support Specialist
description:
**Join us to shape the future!** 
 Teamtailor is a global Employer Branding and ATS SaaS platform used by over 13,000 companies, 200,000 users, and available in 90 countries worldwide. 🌍
   

  

 Working at Teamtailor means being part of a dynamic, fast-paced tech company that values impact and responsibility. Our workplace fosters an environment where everyone can contribute meaningfully to the growth of the company. 🎉🥳
   

  

 Building a diverse team with a wide range of experiences, skills, and backgrounds has always been central to Teamtailor’s mission, and it remains a strength today. We welcome all individuals who share our vision and are committed to contributing to our collective success. Join us in helping companies and people communicate in more meaningful ways to make life-changing decisions together.👫
   

  

 Are you passionate about technology and problem-solving? Join our fast-growing SaaS company and help ensure our customers and internal teams have a seamless technology experience.
   

  

**About the Role!**
 We are looking for a proactive and service-minded IT Support Specialist to provide technical support across our organization and assist customers using our SaaS platform. You’ll troubleshoot issues, maintain systems, and ensure reliable IT operations in a cloud-driven organisation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Provide first and second-line technical support to internal teams across the globe
* Troubleshoot hardware, software, and internet access issues
* Support users with access, permissions, and SaaS platform issues
* Assist with onboarding and offboarding employees (accounts, devices, access)
* Maintain documentation for IT processes and systems as well as compliance


**Requirements**
* Thrive in and is motivated by IT support, helpdesk, or technical support roles
* Familiarity with SaaS organisations and cloud-based environments
* A nothing is impossible attitude. Willingness to learn and adapt to the user
* Strong troubleshooting and communication skills


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to work in a fast-growing SaaS environment
* Work together with likeminded colleagues in a collaborative and supportive team


 If you enjoy solving technical problems and helping people succeed with technology, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 If this sounds like you, please click apply for this job or reach out to our Talent Acquisition team. We welcome applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences and are committed to building an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive.

title: DevOps Engineer to Svea Bank
description:
We are looking for a self-propelled DevOps Engineer to join our dedicated team. We are a team that always puts our developers’ experience at the heart of everything we do. We're always striving for the best solution and are committed to producing work we can be proud of.
   

  

**What will you do?**
 As part of our international DevOps team, with colleagues in both Serbia and Sweden, you will help ensure the company’s developers have all systems and safeguards in place to help them fulfil their role. This ranges from multi-platform environments to Kubernetes environments to an extensive CI/CD toolset to ensure reliable and quick deliveries. On a day-to-day basis you will be performing a number of duties, including:
   

  

* Maintain fully automated CI/CD pipelines for code using Azure DevOps and Octopus Deploy
* Monitor and improve applications process using Dynatrace and Splunk monitoring tools
* Maintain different types of databases but primarily MS SQL servers and related components
* Configure F5 Load Balancers


**What skills do you need?**
 In order to thrive in this role, we think you bring with you a mix of technical skills (scripting, tools, administration), a reasonable understanding of web application development and deployment, as well as excellent communications skills and ability to work across multiple teams, to achieve a shared goal of a seamless developer experience. You are meticulous and have the ability to work according to the set processes and guidelines in an environment that is eventful and varying from day to day, where the structure is built into the ways of working. Furthermore, we think you have:
   

  

* Some professional experience in a relevant DevOps role
* Good scripting experience (PS, Bash, etc.).
* Database administration experience
* Commercial experience with one, or more, of:


 o CI/CD tooling
 ***About Svea***
* Containerization / k8s
* Windows / Linux system administration
* Splunk
* Dynatrace
* A technical education within a relevant discipline (e.g., computer science)
* Excellent communication skills to liaise with multiple teams across multiple locations


*Svea Bank is a financial group with operations in several European countries. For more than 40 years, we have served as a financing partner to companies and thereby helped them reach and exceed their goals! At Svea, there is an entrepreneurial spirit, and we have a distinctly familial corporate culture. We value work-life balance and respect your life outside of work. We are located at Arenastaden in Solna, Sweden.*
**Application**
 We do not accept applications over email, only through this ad. If you have any questions you are welcome to contact recruiter Ellen Hallengren, ellen.hallengren@svea.com.
   

  

 Screening and interviews will be held continuously, so make sure to send in your application as soon as possible!

title: Infra. Technology Specialist
description:
What makes Cognizant a unique place to work? The combination of rapid growth and an international and innovative environment! This is creating a lot of opportunities for people like YOU — people with an entrepreneurial spirit who want to make a difference in this world. At Cognizant, together with your colleagues from all around the world, you will collaborate on creating solutions for the world's leading companies and help them become more flexible, more innovative and successful.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 Own the DevSecOps platform for our international client’s Developer Platform and toolchain, with hands-on leadership across AWS & Azure, Kubernetes, CI/CD, security, and observability. This role combines technical depth with people leadership and stakeholder management to deliver reliable, secure, and scalable services.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Leadership & Stakeholders
   

  

* Lead a team of DevSecOps engineers (mentoring, backlog/priority, code reviews, standards).
* Engage with delivery leadership, product owners, security, and infra teams; translate requirements, align roadmaps, and manage expectations.
* Drive incident/post‑incident reviews, RCA, risk management, and proactive improvement plans.


 Cloud & Platform Ops
   

  

* Architect, implement, and maintain AWSinfrastructure (EKS, RDS, EC2, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation, EBS) and contribute to growing Azure workloads (AKS, IAM/Entra ID fundamentals, networking).
* Operate Kubernetes (EKS/AKS) at scale: deployments, ingress, Helm, performance, cost & capacity.


 Toolchain & CI/CD
   

  

* Own the DevSecOps toolchain lifecycle: Artifactory, SonarQube, Fortify, Confluence, GitGuardian, Sonatype (deploy/upgrade, hardening, monitoring, DR).
* Run self‑hosted agents on AWS for Azure DevOps Pipelines; extend CI/CD with GitHub(Actions, Advanced Security) and champion GitHub Copilot adoption & guardrails.


 Security & Observability
   

  

* Integrate security in pipelines (SAST/SCA/secret scanning), manage TLS certs and secrets.
* Standardize Datadogdashboards/alerts/traces/logs; remove legacy Prometheus/Grafana.


 Identity & Access
   

  

* Design secure access with LDAP, SAML, SCIM, Azure AD (Entra ID), SSO.


 Reliability
   

  

* Define/execute backup & disaster recoverystrategies for critical apps.


**Required Skills**
* AWS (EKS, RDS, EC2, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation, EBS); Azure fundamentals (AKS, networking, identity).
* Kubernetes operations (deployments, ingress, Helm).
* CI/CD: Azure DevOps Pipelines, GitHub (Actions); self‑hosted runners/agents on AWS.
* DevSecOps tools: Artifactory, SonarQube, Fortify, Confluence.
* Linux, Shell, Docker; TLS & secrets management.
* Observability:Datadog.


**Nice-to-have Skills**
* IAM/Federation: LDAP, SAML, SCIM, Azure AD (Entra ID), SSO.
* Infrastructure as Code: Terraform (nice to have).
* ITSM/ServiceNow, change/incident/problem processes.
* Copilot enablement: patterns, prompts, policy & governance.

title: CTO & Co-Founder at a Growing FoodTech Platform
description:
**FlavorScale is looking for a Founding CTO who ships fast, loves food, and wants to turn an already‑proven MVP into
 *the* 
 Gen Z food discovery platform across Northwestern Europe. The app is live on Firebase, we’ve run a pre‑pilot with our biggest success in foodie‑city Copenhagen, and now we’re levelling up for a bigger, louder, more impactful pilot in a major European foodie city while transforming into an AI‑driven, data‑generating machine.**
 FlavorScale is where Gen Z goes to decide
 *where* 
 to eat,
 *what* 
 to try, and
 *which* 
 spots actually match their taste – not just what’s trending. Think food discovery, community and deals in one place, with AI at the core and data fuelling everything we do.
   

  

 Our MVP is built on Google Firebase, already tested with real users, and now we’re ready to scale, personalize, and own the food discovery space for a new generation.
   

  

**Your role as Founding CTO**
 You’re not “just” joining a startup. You’re stepping in as co‑architect of the product and company.
   

  

* Own the tech vision and architecture as we grow from scrappy MVP to a scalable consumer platform.
* Take over and level up our Firebase‑based stack (Firestore, Cloud Functions, Auth, Storage, security rules, CI/CD) and shape our next‑gen setup on Google Cloud.
* Design and build AI/ML‑powered features: recommendation engine, discovery feeds, search/ranking, and personalised food journeys.
* Be the technical face of FlavorScale: sit at the table for product decisions, investor conversations and our first official funding round planned for 2026 Q3.


 You’ll start with meaningful equity as a true co‑founder, then move into a startup salary after the round.
   

  

**Technical must‑haves**
 You’re a builder first, with opinions and battle scars.
   

  

* ~5+ years of hands‑on development, with shipped web or mobile products that real people use.
* Strong experience with Firebase & Google Cloud:
+ Firestore data modelling and queries
+ Cloud Functions
+ Auth & security rules
+ Storage and deployment/CI workflows

* Comfortable across the stack: at least one frontend framework (React / React Native / Flutter) and one backend language (TypeScript/Node or Python preferred).
* Solid in API design and integration, performance tuning, and making pragmatic trade‑offs between speed, cost and robustness.


**AI, data and architecture mindset**
 FlavorScale is becoming a data and AI company. You’ll help make that real.
   

  

* Practical AI/ML product experience: you’ve integrated recommendation systems, smart ranking, or LLM‑based features into real products, not just hackathon demos.
* Strong data mindset: event tracking, analytics, A/B testing basics, and turning behaviour into product decisions and experiments.
* Able to design a scalable architecture for a consumer app: modular, evolvable, and ready to handle growth without constant rewrites.
* Familiar with privacy and security basics for consumer data in an EU context.


**Leadership, Team And Social Skills**
 You’re technical, but you’re also the person others want to build with.
   

  

* Proven hands‑on leadership: led a small team, a squad, or complex projects end‑to‑end; you’re comfortable planning, executing and iterating.
* Strong communicator who can explain tech clearly to non‑technical people and confidently represent FlavorScale with investors, partners and communities.
* Team builder: excited to hire, onboard and mentor early engineers, set engineering standards, and shape a healthy, ambitious culture from day one.
* High ownership and initiative: you spot problems early, propose solutions, and are comfortable making decisions under uncertainty.


**Who You Are (vibes)**
* A real foodie. You care about restaurants, food culture and Gen Z behaviour in cities like Amsterdam, Paris, London, Copenhagen, Berlin, etc.
* You enjoy working closely with the founding team: jam sessions, whiteboards, pilot‑city trips, visiting partners, and being out in the community. Not just behind a screen.
* Experience in foodtech, marketplaces or SaaS/platform products is a big plus.


**Location, language and commitment**
* Ideally based close to Amsterdam/Rotterdam or elsewhere in Northwestern Europe, with openness to spend serious in‑person time in the Netherlands after the 2026 Q2 funding round.
* Fluent in English and at least one other language relevant to the region (Dutch, German, a Scandinavian language, French, etc.).
* Ready to join now on an equity‑first package, transitioning to an agreed startup salary post‑investment, with long‑term upside as a core founder.


 If your perfect week looks like shipping features, playing with data, shaping product with the CEO, and celebrating wins over amazing food in great cities, this is your cue.
   

  

 Send a short intro, links to things you’ve built, and your current favourite food city and why. Let’s see if we’re building the future of food discovery together.

title: Director of Sales
description:

 Interested? Contact

 to learn more about this fantastic opportunity!

title: Supporttekniker 2nd line
description:
Vi söker nu en engagerad IT Supporttekniker som kommer du vara en viktig del av våra centrala supportorganisation. I din roll kommer du att ansvara för att ge våra kunder den service de behöver gällande tekniska frågor och IT-support. Hos oss får du möjligheten att utvecklas i en dynamisk och inspirerande miljö där du blir en av nyckelpersonerna i vår serviceorganisation.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har ett naturligt engagemang för IT och är således involverad och driven i det arbetet du gör. Du bör trivas i en roll med mycket ansvar och tar både funktionalitet och säkerhet i beaktning. Rollen kräver att du har hög grad av servicekänsla och god kommunikativ förmåga.
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 Som IT Supporttekniker är du företagets ansikte utåt och ansvarar för att ge förstklassig support till våra kunder och användare. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Hanterar eskalerade ärenden från 1st line, monitorering och ärenden via vårt supportsystem. Felsöka och lösa IT-problem inom klient, server och nätverksmiljöer.
* Eskalering av mer komplexa ärenden.
* Säkerställa att kunderna får en positiv upplevelse genom snabb och professionell service.


**Vi söker dig som:**
* Minst 4 års arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete inom IT support
* Erfarenhet utav liknande roll
* Nätverkskunskaper
* Har tidigare erfarenhet av att arbete i servermiljö (ex Windows).
* Har erfarenhet av Windows OS, Office 365
* Är serviceinriktad, lösningsfokuserad och har god kommunikationsförmåga.
* Talar och skriver flytande svenska och har goda kunskaper i engelska.


**Meriterande:**
* Erfarenhet utav komplexa och varierade IT miljöer
* Erfarenhet utav Google workspace
* Erfarenhet utav Linux


**Vi erbjuder**
* En viktig roll i ett börsnoterat IT-bolag i stark tillväxt.
* Möjlighet att utvecklas i ett växande bolag.
* Certifieringsmöjligheter
* Tjänstepension


**Om InfraCom Group AB**
 InfraCom Group AB (publ) är en ledande aktör inom IT-infrastruktur. Sedan 1999 erbjuder vi tjänster inom mobil- och fasttelefoni, molnväxel, internet via fiber, server, hosting och webbplattformar. Vi har mer än 30 000 kunder, främst inom SME-segmentet samt offentlig förvaltning.
   

  

* Omsättning: ca 800 miljoner
* Ca 300 medarbetare
* + 20 kontor
* Certifierade enligt ISO9001, ISO14001 och ISO27001
* Anslutna till kollektivavtal


**Arbetsort:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Anställningsform:**
